hook.name: ArrakisPrivateHook
hook.description: Arrakis Finance private vault hook that restricts liquidity additions to authorized vault modules and overrides LP fees per swap direction (zeroForOne/oneForZero) on every swap, enabling custom fee tiers for private Arrakis vaults.

hook.name: BVCC Dynamic Fee Hook (Arbitrum)
hook.description: Dynamically adjusts LP fees per-swap based on current gas price tiers and penalizes high-frequency traders, while collecting an additional protocol fee in afterSwap from the swap output.

hook.name: WETH Hook (Arbitrum)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that enables seamless wrapping and unwrapping of ETH and WETH in a dedicated zero-fee pool, intercepting swaps to perform 1:1 ETH↔WETH conversion while blocking direct liquidity operations.

hook.name: BackGeoOracle
hook.description: A TWAP oracle hook that records price observations and mitigates price impact by executing automatic backruns on large swaps, crediting the original sender with ERC6909 tokens. Only exact-input swaps are supported; calling routers must implement IMsgSender.

hook.name: SafeSwap
hook.description: Anti-rug and anti-whale protection hook. Sell rate limiting, cooldowns, progressive fees, launch protection mode. Immutable config per pool.

hook.name: UniswapV4KEMHook
hook.description: A swap hook that requires a signed off-chain quote in hookData for each swap, validating exchange rate, nonce, and expiry against a designated quote signer. Excess output beyond the signed maximum exchange rate is captured as EG tokens minted as ERC-6909 claims in the PoolManager, claimable by designated accounts.

hook.name: The Pool
hook.description: The Pool protocol's volatility-adjusted fee hook (on-chain contract: DynamicFeeHookV2). Takes a percentage of each swap's output via afterSwapReturnsDelta (25 bps base, scaling up to 37.5 bps under realized volatility) and routes it to a fee distributor. Also supports reserve-sale fills in beforeSwap, where a registered vault can offer single-sided inventory to swappers at a chosen price in either price-improvement or vault-spread mode.

hook.name: Alphix
hook.description: JIT (just-in-time) liquidity hook that atomically adds concentrated liquidity around each swap in beforeSwap and removes it in afterSwap to improve price execution. Uses a dynamic fee algorithm that adjusts LP fees based on the pool's token ratio, and re-hypothecates idle liquidity to external yield sources.

hook.name: The Pool
hook.description: Uniswap v4 dynamic fee hook that captures 25 bps per swap (scaling 1.5× in volatile blocks) and routes 80% of fees back to in-range LPs via poolManager.donate(), with the remaining 20% to treasury. Pairs with an ERC-4626 vault for auto-compounding LP yield. No emissions token.

hook.name: WLimitOrderHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook implementing single-tick limit orders with atomic swap + order placement. Users place orders by adding concentrated liquidity at a specific tick; when the pool price crosses that tick, the position is automatically filled. The swapAndPlaceOrder() function combines a swap and limit order placement in a single transaction, preventing front-running. Filled orders can be withdrawn at any time.

hook.name: FeeHook
hook.description: Tracks swap fees in afterSwap and periodically collects them from an LP position, burning non-native token proceeds. Distributes accumulated ETH fees weekly to vMooney token holders who check in each week.

hook.name: FedzHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for a stablecoin pool that restricts swaps and liquidity operations to the current active player in an external time-slot system (checked via tx.origin), and reverts any swap whose post-execution price falls below a configurable depeg threshold.

hook.name: External DEX Wrapper (Arbitrum)
hook.description: Routes Uniswap v4 swaps through the Camelot (Algebra) V3 ETH/USDC pool on Arbitrum, intercepting swaps in beforeSwap and fully settling them via BeforeSwapDelta with a configurable owner-adjustable fee ratio.

hook.name: Spot
hook.description: Full-range AMM hook with a truncated geometric mean oracle that dynamically adjusts LP fees (base + surge) based on tick movement. Charges a configurable protocol fee share on each swap and reinvests it into a full-range liquidity position via the FullRangeLiquidityManager.

hook.name: VTSwapHook(ATH-vATH)
hook.description: A custom AMM hook that implements a vesting token (VT) to underlying token (T) swap market with a custom pricing curve delegated to an external helper contract, completely replacing Uniswap v4's default concentrated liquidity mechanism.

hook.name: VTSwapHook
hook.description: A custom-curve Uniswap v4 hook that implements an AMM for swapping between a Vesting Token (VT) and its underlying token (T), delegating pricing to an external helper contract. Provides its own LP token (ERC-20) and manages reserves directly, replacing the standard concentrated liquidity curve.

hook.name: Slippage Fee Hook (Arbitrum)
hook.description: Dynamically computes LP fees before each swap based on the simulated price impact (tick difference between current and post-swap price), charging higher fees for larger swaps to reduce impermanent loss for liquidity providers. Requires pools to use dynamic fees and reverts any swap that would cause slippage exceeding 5%.

hook.name: Limit Order Hook (Arbitrum)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that enables limit order functionality by recording the tick before each swap and delegating to a LimitOrderManager contract after each swap to execute any limit orders whose tick range was crossed. Supports dynamic LP fee updates via a permissioned fee manager role.

hook.name: EMADynamicFeeHook
hook.description: EMA-based dynamic fee hook for Uniswap V4. Calculates swap fees using Exponential Moving Average of price, with 30-step fee schedule (0.01%-3.00%) and 300-block anti-JIT protection via tx.origin. No owner, no admin functions, fully immutable.

hook.name: Clanker Static Fee Hook (Arbitrum)
hook.description: A Clanker token launch hook for Arbitrum that applies separate, configurable LP fees for buys and sells of the Clanker token (set statically at pool initialization), and collects a protocol fee on each swap via beforeSwap and afterSwap delta adjustments. It also includes a short-lived MEV protection module active in the first two minutes after pool creation.

hook.name: Clanker Dynamic Fee Hook (Arbitrum)
hook.description: Clanker V4 hook for autonomous token deployment with dynamic fees that adjust based on swap volatility using a tick-based accumulator model. Also includes MEV protection via an optional external module active for the first 2 minutes after pool creation.

hook.name: StrategyFeeHook
hook.description: Charges a fixed 10% fee (1000 bps) on the output token of each swap in owner-allowlisted pools, then converts the collected fees to AVAX or WAVAX and forwards them to a configurable strategy manager contract.

hook.name: StrategyFeeHook
hook.description: Collects a fixed 10% fee on the output token of every swap in owner-allowlisted pools, converting non-AVAX fees to AVAX via an in-pool swap, and forwarding all collected fees to a configurable strategy manager contract.

hook.name: AuthSwaps
hook.description: A KYC-gated Uniswap v4 hook that restricts swaps, liquidity operations, and pool initialization to addresses verified through the Manifest Finance AuthManager contract. Swaps are additionally gated by a per-chain trusted-sender allowlist.

hook.name: StrategyFeeHook
hook.description: Charges a 10% fee on the output token of each swap in owner-allowlisted pools, converting non-AVAX fees to AVAX via an in-pool nested swap, then forwarding all collected fees to a configurable strategy manager contract.

hook.name: AuthSwaps
hook.description: Restricts swaps, liquidity operations, and pool initialization to users verified as whitelisted and not banned or sanctioned by an external Manifest Finance Auth Manager contract, with router-level access gated via an owner-managed trusted-sender allowlist.

hook.name: ArenaHook
hook.description: A fee-collecting hook that charges a configurable percentage of swap output in afterSwap, distributing fees to multiple recipients defined by an external ArenaFeeHelper contract. Pool initialization is restricted to allowlisted deployer addresses.

hook.name: Zora Hook
hook.description: Zora's Uniswap v4 hook for their Coins protocol on Base, which applies a dynamic launch fee that decays from 99% to 1% over the 10 seconds after coin creation. On every swap it collects LP fees, converts them to a backing currency, and distributes rewards to creators and trade referrers.

hook.name: GovernedLBPStrategy
hook.description: A governance-controlled Liquidity Bootstrapping Pool (LBP) strategy hook that restricts pool initialization to the contract itself and blocks all swaps until a designated governance address approves migration. After approval, it deploys full-range liquidity from a completed token distribution phase.

hook.name: LpGuardHook
hook.description: A hook that restricts pool initialization to a single whitelisted launcher address, reverting any attempt to initialize a pool from an unauthorized caller.

hook.name: GovernedLBPStrategy
hook.description: A governance-controlled Liquidity Bootstrapping Pool (LBP) strategy hook that restricts pool initialization to the contract itself and blocks all swaps until a designated governance address approves migration.

hook.name: OwnerManagedRangeHook
hook.description: Owner-managed concentrated liquidity hook for a single SLEUTH/USDC pool on Base. Maintains two hook-owned positions (a main concentrated range and a single-sided USDC bid), with owner-controlled seeding, reanchoring, and optional auto-compounding of accrued fees triggered on each swap.

hook.name: Apex Yield
hook.description: Oracle-priced market maker hook that intercepts swaps at Pyth oracle price + dynamic fee. Fees accumulate in-pool and are distributed as dual-token rewards to LP depositors via a Synthetix-style accumulator. ~285K gas per swap.

hook.name: AI Protocol Swap Fee Hook v1 (Base)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that charges a configurable fee on swaps involving a designated fee token. Fees are collected in beforeSwap and afterSwap based on whether the operation is a buy or sell and whether the swap is exact-in or exact-out, then forwarded to a configured fee recipient contract.

hook.name: Zora Creator Hook v2.2.1 (Base)
hook.description: A Uniswap V4 hook for Zora's Creator Coin protocol that automatically collects LP fees after each swap, converts them to a backing currency via multi-hop paths, and distributes rewards to creators and trade referrers. On pool initialization, it sets up multiple liquidity positions based on the coin's Doppler multi-curve configuration.

hook.name: GovernedLBPStrategy
hook.description: A Liquidity Bootstrapping Pool (LBP) hook that gates pool initialization to the strategy contract itself and blocks all swaps until a designated governance address approves migration, then migrates raised funds into a full-range Uniswap v4 liquidity position.

hook.name: SpectraHook
hook.description: Standalone afterSwap hook for SpectraLaunch token pools: after each swap, harvests the pool token's parked fee balance via takeFeeBalance(), auto-sells it for ETH via a nested poolManager.swap() call, then distributes the ETH proceeds to token holders pro-rata via the token's creditPoolFees() accumulator.

hook.name: ArrakisPrivateHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for Arrakis private vaults that overrides LP fees per swap direction (zeroForOne vs oneForZero) as configured by the vault executor, and restricts liquidity additions to the vault's active module.

hook.name: ClankerHookStaticFeeV2
hook.description: Clanker protocol hook that configures asymmetric static LP fees per pool (separate buy and sell rates for the clanker token), collects protocol fees from swaps via BeforeSwapDelta and AfterSwapDelta, and includes an optional MEV module that can temporarily raise fees to deter sandwich attacks during the initial liquidity deployment window.

hook.name: A51peg Hook
hook.description: A51pegHook locks the A51peg token pool on first liquidity addition, and in afterSwap opportunistically triggers NFT reveal when an unrevealed token is pending. Emits swap analytics events via AlienSwap. No swap access control.

hook.name: SuperStrategy Hook (Base)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that collects a 2% fee on each swap and auto-compounds the accumulated reserves back into pool liquidity. It forwards 0.30% to a protocol fee receiver, allows admin-designated market makers to trade fee-free, and supports multi-pool liquidity management with configurable auto-compounding thresholds.

hook.name: tokens.fun HookStaticFeeV2
hook.description: Token launchpad hook with static fees, MEV protection, automated LP locking, fee conversion, and pool extensions. Used by tokens.fun on Base.

hook.name: ClankerHookStaticFeeV2
hook.description: A Clanker protocol hook with configurable per-direction static LP fees (clanker vs paired token direction), dynamically updated on each swap via updateDynamicLPFee. Collects a 20% protocol fee on the non-clanker token per trade using BeforeSwapDelta and AfterSwapDelta, with optional MEV protection modules and pool extensions.

hook.name: SnapBackHook
hook.description: Oracle-based market maker using Pyth price feeds, dynamic fees, and atomic multi-DEX rebalancing

hook.name: MoonsendFeeHook_BASE
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that enforces per-pool dynamic LP fee overrides. Pools must be pre-registered by an authorized factory before initialization; `beforeSwap` returns the registered fee with the OVERRIDE_FEE_FLAG set, overriding the pool's LP fee on every swap.

hook.name: BpegHook
hook.description:
An afterSwap hook that syncs NFT metadata with token balance. 
When a user buys BPEG tokens, the hook mints NFT metadata 
proportional to their integer balance. When they sell, it burns 
NFT metadata accordingly. Uses tx.origin to identify the end user.

hook.name: Flaunch POSM v4 (Base)
hook.description: Flaunch's PositionManager is a Uniswap v4 hook that manages the full lifecycle of memecoin launches, from token creation and fair-launch phase to ongoing swaps. It incorporates an InternalSwapPool for protocol fee accumulation, a BidWall for native-token liquidity support, and a FeeDistributor that routes swap fees to creators and optional referrers encoded in hookData.

hook.name: TELxIncentiveHook
hook.description: Tracks LP positions and fee accruals in an external PositionRegistry to support off-chain incentive/reward distribution. Liquidity callbacks are restricted to an authorized position manager address; no swap logic is implemented.

hook.name: DCAHook
hook.description: A hook that gates liquidity additions on two specific pools: limits the ETH/DCA pool to a single initial liquidity add, and enforces full-range tick bounds (±887200) for the DCA/SPX6900 pool via beforeAddLiquidity.

hook.name: WhaleAIHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook with parabolic fee decay that collects protocol fees via hook deltas on all swap directions (buy/sell, exact-input/exact-output), includes optional same-block MEV protection via hookData, and periodically auto-sells accumulated fees to ETH.

hook.name: MoonpotHook
hook.description: A USDC/TMP pool hook that applies dynamic defense taxes on TMP sells (scaled by distance above a configurable price floor), intercepts and burns excess TMP beyond the protocol liquidity cap via BeforeSwapDelta, and records a TWAP oracle to guard against sandwich attacks during liquidity injection.

hook.name: GovernedLBPStrategy
hook.description: A Liquidity Bootstrapping Pool (LBP) strategy hook that restricts pool initialization to the hook contract itself and gates all swaps behind a governance-approved migration flag.

hook.name: Zora Post Hook v2.2.1 (Base)
hook.description: Zora's content coin hook that manages multi-position liquidity for creator coins, collecting swap fees after each trade and distributing them as rewards to creators, referrers, and LPs in a backing currency. Supports liquidity migration to new hook versions via a registered upgrade gate.

hook.name: BVCC Dynamic Fee Hook (Base)
hook.description: An advanced dynamic fee hook by BlockVenture Chain Capital that adjusts LP fees based on gas price, price volatility, and 24-hour trade volume, while applying anti-bot cooldown penalties for repeated swaps. It also collects a small protocol fee on each swap output via afterSwapReturnsDelta.

hook.name: ClawnchHookStaticFeeV2
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for Clawnch token deployments that sets distinct static LP fees for clawnch-direction vs. paired-direction swaps, and collects a 20% protocol fee on each swap by adjusting swap amounts via beforeSwap and afterSwap return deltas.

hook.name: ClawnchHookStaticFeeV2
hook.description: Token launcher hook for Base. Fork of Clanker ClankerHookV2 with security fixes: transient storage for reentrant fee safety, slippage protection on fee swaps, MEV decay boundary fix, per-direction static fees, fee preference system, VestedDevBuy extension.

hook.name: Seedify Fee Hook
hook.description: Collects fees on swaps involving a designated fundraising currency. Fees split between platform treasury and optional creator treasury, with launch vs post-launch fee tiers.

hook.name: SeedifyFeeHook
hook.description: A time-based fundraise fee hook for Uniswap v4 that charges configurable fees on swaps involving a designated fundraise token, with a higher initial rate during a launch window that drops to a lower rate afterward. Fees are split between platform and creator treasuries and accumulated for on-demand withdrawal.

hook.name: Clanker Dynamic Fee Hook (Base)
hook.description: A Clanker hook that dynamically adjusts LP fees based on tick volatility accumulation, updating pool fees on every swap via updateDynamicLPFee. It also applies a protocol fee by capturing a portion of swaps as EIP-6909 claims, and optionally forwards hookData to an external MEV module during a post-launch window.

hook.name: Wassblaster Hook
hook.description: A hook for wASS/memecoin pairs that charges a 1% total fee (0.3% to LPs, 0.7% to the hook) and routes a configurable portion of buys through an in-swap OTC mechanism at the actual pool rate, distributing wASS fee proceeds to stakers and accumulating memecoin fees as OTC inventory.

hook.name: UniswapV4ScheduledMulticurveInitializerHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that restricts pool initialization and liquidity additions to a designated initializer contract, enforces a per-pool scheduled start time before which swaps revert with CannotSwapBeforeStartingTime, and emits events for liquidity modifications and swaps.

hook.name: LayerMeme Dynamic Fee Hook v2 (Base)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook used by the LAYERMEME token launch platform. It dynamically adjusts LP fees based on volatility, collects a protocol fee on launched token swaps, and supports optional MEV protection modules and per-pool extensions via custom swap data. The source is verified on BaseScan and the hook is deployed on Base mainnet.

hook.name: UniswapV4KEMHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that enforces signed quotes for exact-input swaps. Each swap requires hookData containing a valid signature from an authorized quoteSigner; if the swap yields more output than the quoted maximum exchange rate allows, the excess is minted as ERC6909 tokens to an admin-controlled recipient.

hook.name: GPX Hook (Base)
hook.description: GPXHooks manages the Uniswap V4 GPX-USDC liquidity pool, collecting 1% fees per swap and distributing them across four destinations (GoldPesa Mines, Treasury, Pawn, and GPX Owner), while blocking unauthorized liquidity changes and periodically triggering automated pool rebalancing.

hook.name: Spectra Launchpad
hook.description: Bonding-curve memecoin launchpad that raises ETH along a linear curve, then graduates into a Uniswap V4 ETH/token pool. ERC-20 balances are mirrored as NFTs ("facets"); pool swap fees are harvested and distributed pro-rata to facet holders in ETH.

hook.name: WontonHook
hook.description: Restricts liquidity additions to a single authorized manager address and gates buy-side swaps behind a governance-controlled `tradingEnabled` flag. Pre-launch exact-input buys are punished: the input token is taken but output is forced to zero via beforeSwapReturnsDelta.

hook.name: JanpuHookDynamicFeeV2
hook.description: JANPU Base launchpad hook that adjusts LP fees with a volatility accumulator, collects JANPU protocol fees on launched-token swaps, supports optional MEV fee protection and pool extensions, and accepts empty hook data for standard swaps.

hook.name: Pubhouse Hook
hook.description: A token launchpad hook that performs internal swaps using accumulated token fees to fill buy orders, distributes LP fees between token creators and the protocol team, and automatically buybacks and burns the protocol token when accumulated ETH exceeds a threshold.

hook.name: Flaunch POSM v1
hook.description: The Flaunch PositionManager is a Uniswap v4 hook that manages the full lifecycle of memecoin creation and trading, including a fair launch window, an internal swap pool for fee reinvestment, and fee distribution to token creators and referrers.

hook.name: KPEGHook
hook.description: Updates an on-chain randomness seed after each swap in pools containing the configured token, using block variables and swap metadata. On the first liquidity addition to a qualifying pool, calls start() on a lifecycle token contract.

hook.name: GBPFv4Hook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that intercepts all swaps against a USDS/GBPF pool and fully replaces pool math with primary-market mint or redeem operations against a vault, pricing trades via a GBP/USD oracle TWAP, a solvency-indexed spread curve, and a flat 20 bp protocol fee.

hook.name: Deli Hook (Base)
hook.description: Collects swap fees always in wBLT and forwards them to a FeeProcessor contract, while enforcing that all pools include wBLT as a token and use dynamic LP fees (overriding them to 0 at swap time). Syncs DailyEpochGauge and IncentiveGauge on every swap to support incentive accounting.

hook.name: Adaptive Burn Hook
hook.description: Automatically burns a configurable percentage of PR token output on buys and captures ETH into a vault on sells. Burn and capture rates are admin-adjustable within bounds, capped at a maximum of 5%.

hook.name: BackGeoOracle
hook.description: A TWAP oracle hook that performs partial backruns after price-impacting swaps: when a swap moves the tick beyond a threshold, the hook executes an inverse swap via poolManager.swap() and credits the surplus to the original sender as ERC6909 tokens. Only exactIn swaps are supported; routers must implement IMsgSender() to identify the recipient for backrun proceeds.

hook.name: BackGeoOracle
hook.description: A TWAP oracle hook that combines price observation with a geometric backrun mechanism, automatically reversing a proportional share of swaps that cause significant price impact and crediting the excess tokens back to the original user via ERC6909 minting.

hook.name: Fey Hook (Base)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for Fey Protocol that manages paired-token pools with per-direction static LP fees and a 20% protocol fee. It includes MEV protection active for 2 minutes post-launch, optional pool extensions, and LP locker integration for automatic fee collection.

hook.name: Zora Post Hook v1.1.1.1 (Base)
hook.description: A Zora content coin hook that mints multiple Doppler-style liquidity positions on pool initialization and, on every swap, collects LP fees, swaps them to a backing currency, and distributes rewards to coin holders and optional trade referrers encoded in hookData. It supports a governance-gated liquidity migration path to successor hook implementations.

hook.name: Super Strategy v2 (Base)
hook.description: A fee-compounding hook that skims a portion of each swap's input as fees, splitting the take between a per-pool hook balance and a protocol fee receiver, then allows that accumulated hook balance to be deployed as liquidity back into the pool.

hook.name: SuperStrategy
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that collects percentage-based swap fees using BeforeSwapDelta, splitting proceeds between a per-pool hook reserve and a configurable protocol fee receiver. Manages concentrated liquidity positions per pool with cooldown-gated rebalancing logic.

hook.name: GovernedLBPStrategy
hook.description: A governance-gated Liquidity Bootstrapping Pool (LBP) strategy hook that blocks swaps until a designated governance address approves migration, then migrates token distribution from a bootstrapping phase to a full-range Uniswap v4 pool position.

hook.name: Coinbase Verified Hook (Base)
hook.description: A Coinbase-authored access-control hook for Verified Pools that restricts pool initialization, liquidity operations, swaps, and donations to addresses verified by configurable on-chain policies. Also collects an optional configurable bips-based hook fee on swaps via afterSwapReturnsDelta.

hook.name: Zora Creator Hook v1.1.1.1 (Base)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for Zora creator coins that collects LP fees on every swap, converts them to a backing currency, and distributes them as rewards. Supports optional trade referrals via hookData and gated liquidity migration to new hook versions.

hook.name: LayerMeme Static Fee Hook v2 (Base)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook used by the LAYERMEME token launch platform. It enforces fixed LP fees per launched token pool, collects a protocol fee on launched token swaps, and supports optional MEV protection modules and per-pool extensions via custom swap data. The source is verified on BaseScan and the hook is deployed on Base mainnet.

hook.name: MoonpotHook
hook.description: A floor-price defense hook for a TMP/USDC pool. It applies a dynamic sell tax that ramps from a maximum rate near the floor tick down to a base rate as price rises above it, and intercepts and burns excess TMP tokens that would push the price below the protocol floor. Buys are charged a flat base defense tax.

hook.name: Angstrom Hook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that implements MEV-aware swap and liquidity taxes, distributing fees between the protocol, pool creator, and LPs via return deltas. Includes a governance-controlled withdraw-only mode that blocks new swaps and liquidity additions.

hook.name: AngstromL2
hook.description: MEV-aware hook that taxes top-of-block swaps based on priority fees and charges configurable fees on swaps and JIT liquidity additions/removals, distributing LP compensation rewards proportional to liquidity across affected ticks.

hook.name: SuperStrategy
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that skims 2.3% from each swap (2% retained in hook reserves for auto-compounding, 0.3% forwarded to a protocol fee receiver) via BeforeSwapDelta. Accumulated reserves are periodically compounded back into pool liquidity positions (one NFT position per pool), with an incentive mechanism rewarding callers who trigger the compounding.

hook.name: Super Strategy v3 (Base)
hook.description: A fee-collecting hook that splits each swap's input into a 2% hook reserve and 0.3% protocol fee, accumulating reserves per pool so anyone can trigger auto-compounding back into concentrated LP positions when a configurable threshold is met.

hook.name: EstateHook
hook.description: A bonding curve AMM hook that replaces standard pool swaps with buy/sell actions against a logarithmic curve. Buyers mint EstateTokens by paying ETH; sellers burn tokens to receive ETH, with 10% of proceeds withheld as rental rewards distributed through the EstateToken contract.

hook.name: XDHook
hook.description: A launchpad hook that gates pool initialization, liquidity management, and swaps to authorized actors pre-graduation, collecting WETH-denominated fees as ERC-6909 claims. After graduation, access restrictions are lifted and the swap fee is capped at 0.15%.

hook.name: XDHook
hook.description: A launchpad hook that collects swap fees (initially 2%) via ERC-6909 claims, preferring WETH when possible. Pre-graduation, pool initialization, liquidity, and swaps are restricted to allowlisted actors via an authority registry; post-graduation, access control is lifted and the fee is capped at 0.15%.

hook.name: SpectraLaunch
hook.description: SPECTRA launchpad afterSwap hook on Base — the token is its own Uniswap v4 hook (holding = LP). Token contract 0x6b80ce7c95b0206b14ce9977c904e11918d48040. Source verified on BaseScan.

hook.name: GPO Hook (Base)
hook.description: An immutable, ownerless Uniswap v4 hook for the GoldPesa Option (GPO) token that deploys GPO, seeds a full-range liquidity position, and enforces a 10% USDC fee on every swap via BeforeSwapDelta and AfterSwapDelta. Liquidity is permanently locked after initial minting, and donations and unauthorized pool initialization are blocked.

hook.name: BTC ACC Hook (Base)
hook.description: A hook that takes a configurable fee (1-10%) on each swap and deposits it into a Bitcoin accumulation contract, converting swap fees from ETH, WETH, USDC, or cbBTC into Bitcoin for the swapper. The beforeInitialize hook enforces that pools must pair exactly one allowed base token (ETH/WETH/USDC/cbBTC) with a non-base token.

hook.name: FloorPad Floor Hook
hook.description: Singleton Uniswap v4 hook serving all FloorPad memecoins (per-pool state keyed by poolId). On each buy, diverts a dynamic cut of the WETH input into a per-pool vault and fees to protocol/creator; on each sell, skims a fee from the WETH output. The vault backs a WETH-per-token redemption floor that ratchets up only on buys; holders can burn coins to redeem at the floor at any time.

hook.name: tokens.fun HookStaticFee
hook.description: Token launchpad hook with static trading fees, MEV protection, and automated LP locking. Used by tokens.fun on Base.

hook.name: ClankerHookStaticFee
hook.description: A Clanker factory hook that applies configurable, direction-sensitive LP fees (separate rates for buying vs selling the clanker token) using the dynamic fee mechanism, while also collecting a 20% protocol fee from the paired token on each swap. Includes a time-limited MEV protection module active for the first 2 minutes after pool creation.

hook.name: Basememe Hook (Base)
hook.description: A meme token launchpad hook that restricts pool initialization and liquidity addition to a factory contract, enforcing a token graduation lifecycle. After each swap, it triggers reward collection via an LP manager and optionally tracks trade referrals passed through hookData.

hook.name: SpectraLaunch
hook.description: Spectra launchpad hook on Base. ERC-20 + Uniswap V4 afterSwap hook where holding the token is providing liquidity (swap fees accrue pro-rata to holders). Graduated from a bonding curve. Token contract: 0x7624aC031CA94a9D6f732A74EF90EA10c5510040.

hook.name: AlphixLVRFee
hook.description: A dynamic fee hook that combines per-pool adjustable LP fees set by a restricted admin with a configurable protocol hook fee captured from swap output as ERC-6909 claims, forwarded to a treasury address.

hook.name: Alphix LVR Fee Hook
hook.description: Dynamic LP fee hook that applies admin-controlled per-pool LP fees via `updateDynamicLPFee` and charges a configurable per-pool protocol fee on each swap's output via `afterSwap` with delta return. Accumulated protocol fees are held as ERC-6909 claims and can be swept to a treasury address by calling `handleHookFees()`.

hook.name: VenaHook
hook.description: Custom-accounting Uniswap v4 hook for ETH/VENA on Base. Uses afterSwap return delta (1% output fee), distributes 80% to NFT holders and 20% to treasury, and applies buy/sell NFT game logic.

hook.name: ClankerHookDynamicFeeV2
hook.description: Uniswap v4 hook for Clanker token pools that dynamically adjusts LP fees based on a tick-volatility accumulator model, and takes a protocol fee (20% of the LP fee) on swaps involving the non-Clanker paired token. Includes an optional MEV-protection module active for up to 2 minutes after pool creation.

hook.name: tokens.fun HookDynamicFeeV2
hook.description: Token launchpad hook with volatility-based dynamic fees, MEV protection (sniper auctions, block/time delays), automated LP locking with up to 7 positions, fee conversion, and pool extensions. Used by tokens.fun on Base. All pools pair with WETH.

hook.name: AngstromL2
hook.description: Uniswap v4 hook that charges a priority-fee-based MEV tax on swaps and JIT liquidity additions/removals, distributing collected fees between pool creator and factory protocol while compensating LPs via a per-tick reward accumulator system. Only supports ETH-paired pools.

hook.name: AngstromL2
hook.description: Implements the Angstrom MEV-tax protocol, applying a priority-fee-based MEV tax on swaps and JIT liquidity additions/removals, with proceeds distributed to LPs and the protocol. Pool creation is restricted to the owner or factory contract, and the hook supports an emergency withdraw-only mode controlled by the factory.

hook.name: LiquidHookDynamicFeeV2
hook.description: Liquid Protocol's dynamic fee hook that adjusts LP fees based on realized volatility (tick movement across swaps) and collects a 20% protocol fee on paired token swaps. It includes a time-limited MEV protection module that can temporarily increase fees and an optional pool extension system for post-swap callbacks.

hook.name: Liquid Dynamic Fee Hook V2
hook.description: Uniswap V4 hook with volatility-responsive dynamic LP fees (0.5%-5%), MEV protection via descending fee modules, per-swap pool extensions, and protocol fee collection. Powers Liquid Protocol token pools on Base.

hook.name: Zora Post Hook v1.1.1 (Base)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for Zora content coins that sets up initial concentrated LP positions after pool initialization and collects/distributes creator rewards and trade referral fees after each swap.

hook.name: Zora Creator Hook v2.2 (Base)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for Zora Creator Coins that creates multiple Doppler-curve liquidity positions upon pool initialization, and on every swap automatically collects accrued LP fees, converts them to a backing currency, and distributes the proceeds as creator rewards.

hook.name: Hook_V2
hook.description: EMA-based dynamic fee hook for Uniswap V4. Calculates swap fees using Exponential Moving Average of price, with 30-step fee schedule (0.01%-3.00%) and 300-block anti-JIT protection via tx.origin. No owner, no admin functions, fully immutable.

hook.name: TrinityHookV10
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that manages a hook-owned LP position with a fixed dynamic fee, restricts liquidity additions to an owner-managed allowlist via beforeAddLiquidity, and provides permissionless fee harvesting that burns the project token side to a dead address and best-effort forwards the quote side to a configurable fee recipient.

hook.name: RwagmiHookV2
hook.description: RWAGMI Hook V2 is a Uniswap v4 launch hook for Base B20 Asset/WETH pools. It gates pool initialization so pools are created only through the RWAGMI launcher, supports optional dynamic LP fee overrides, and runs a mandatory launch-auction module during the first swaps to redirect early launch MEV into the pool's locker/reward split. After the auction window ends, swaps continue normally through the v4 pool.

hook.name: Zora Creator Hook v1.0.0.1 (Base)
hook.description: Manages Uniswap v4 liquidity positions for Zora Creator Coins, collecting LP fees after each swap and distributing them as rewards to creators, trade referrers, and liquidity providers. Supports liquidity migration to new hook versions via a permissioned on-chain upgrade gate.

hook.name: Aegis v3 Hook (Base)
hook.description: Spot is a Uniswap v4 hook that implements surge-based dynamic fees using a truncated geometric oracle, charges protocol fees (POL share) on swaps, and manages a full-range liquidity position that automatically reinvests accrued fees.

hook.name: UniswapV4MulticurveInitializerHook
hook.description: Hook used by the Uniswap V4 Multicurve Initializer to restrict pool initialization and liquidity additions to the designated initializer contract. Emits events on liquidity modifications and swaps; afterSwap is observation-only with no delta modification.

hook.name: Flaunch AnyPOSM v1 (Base)
hook.description: The Flaunch AnyPositionManager hook enables any ERC20 token to use a BidWall and community fee distribution on Uniswap v4. It supports an internal swap pool, fair launch mechanics, referrer fee sharing via hookData, and emits comprehensive pool event tracking.

hook.name: Aegis
hook.description: AegisHook charges dynamic swap fees set per-swap by DynamicFeeManager, collects additional hook fees on each swap, and periodically reinvests them as full-range liquidity via AegisEngine. It manages oracle observation cardinality growth and notifies LimitOrderManager and OracleManager after each swap.

hook.name: CreatorCoinHook
hook.description: A Zora creator coin hook that on every swap collects LP fees from all positions, converts them to a backing currency via multi-hop swap paths, and distributes rewards to the creator and market participants. On pool initialization, it mints multiple Doppler-curve liquidity positions for the coin.

hook.name: Zora Creator Hook v1.1.1 (Base)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for Zora's creator coin ecosystem that initializes multiple liquidity positions on pool creation and automatically collects LP fees on every swap, converting them to a backing currency and distributing rewards to creators, referrers, and the protocol.

hook.name: Deli Constant Product Hook (Base)
hook.description: Implements a constant product (x·y=k) AMM within Uniswap v4, replacing concentrated liquidity with traditional V2-style pool mechanics and integrating epoch-based incentive gauges and a fee processor for reward distribution.

hook.name: Bonker Dynamic Fee Hook (Base)
hook.description: A volume-based dynamic-fee Uniswap v4 hook for the Bonker token launch platform on Base. Adjusts LP fees via `updateDynamicLPFee()` based on volume accumulation, takes a 20% protocol fee on each swap via delta returns, and includes a time-limited MEV module (up to 2 minutes post-launch) that can temporarily raise fees during the launch window.

hook.name: SpectraHook
hook.description: Uniswap v4 afterSwap hook for SpectraLaunch tokens that auto-harvests the token's parked fee balance after every swap, sells the tokens for ETH via a nested swap inside the same unlock context, and credits the ETH proceeds pro-rata to token holders.

hook.name: Liquid Static Fee Hook V2
hook.description: Uniswap V4 hook with fixed LP fee configuration, MEV protection via descending fee modules, per-swap pool extensions, and protocol fee collection. Alternative to the Dynamic Fee hook for Liquid Protocol pools preferring stable fees.

hook.name: LiquidHookStaticFeeV2
hook.description: A Liquid Protocol hook that enforces a static LP fee per pool (configured at initialization with separate rates for buying and selling the liquid token) and collects a 20% protocol fee on swaps. Includes optional MEV protection that can temporarily raise fees for up to 2 minutes after pool creation.

hook.name: V4PoolHook
hook.description: V4PoolHook charges a fixed 1% protocol fee on exact-input swaps by intercepting input tokens via poolManager.take() and returning a BeforeSwapDelta; exact-output swaps are unconditionally blocked. Accumulated fees are claimable by a designated FEE_COLLECTOR role, and liquidity addition is restricted to an lpManager until a CONFIG_ADMIN enables public liquidity.

hook.name: INT Fee Hook
hook.description: Charges a fixed 1% protocol fee on exact-input swaps by intercepting the input amount via beforeSwap with beforeSwapReturnsDelta, accumulating fees claimable by a FEE_COLLECTOR role. Pool initialization and liquidity additions are restricted to an authorized LP manager until public liquidity is enabled by a CONFIG_ADMIN.

hook.name: AquinasPoolHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for Aquinas DAOs that restricts pool initialization to factory-authorized Safe addresses, preventing frontrunning by requiring pre-approval before a specific pool can be initialized.

hook.name: AquinasPoolHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that restricts pool initialization to addresses pre-authorized by the Aquinas factory. Only the designated Safe address for a given pool may call PoolManager.initialize(), preventing unauthorized parties from initializing pools for Aquinas DAOs.

hook.name: SwayHookJIT
hook.description: JIT-LP hook for token launches with engine-based dynamic pricing (PowerCurve / Momentum / Hybrid). Hook holds 100% of token supply at launch and provides liquidity just-in-time during swaps via beforeSwap/afterSwap callbacks. Designed to look like a standard V4 pool to off-chain quoters.

hook.name: Limit Order Hook (Base)
hook.description: A limit order hook that records the tick before each swap and triggers limit order execution after the swap completes by delegating to a LimitOrderManager contract. It also supports role-based dynamic LP fee management via AccessControl.

hook.name: ETH-flETH Auto Wrap Hook (Base)
hook.description: A 1:1 ETH/flETH swap hook that fully handles swaps in beforeSwap by depositing/withdrawing from the flETH contract, acting as a custom curve with zero fees. Liquidity additions are blocked, and only the ETH/flETH pair is accepted.

hook.name: Zora Post Hook v1.1.2 (Base)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for Zora content coins that automatically collects LP fees after each swap, converts them to a backing currency via multi-hop paths, and distributes rewards to coin creators and trade referrers. On pool initialization, it creates multiple liquidity positions using Doppler multi-curve configurations.

hook.name: SuperTokenWrapperHook
hook.description: Hook for upgrading/downgrading (wrapping/unwrapping) SuperTokens (Wrapper Super Tokens) via Uniswap V4 pools. Inspired by the WETHHook from Uniswap V4 Periphery.

hook.name: Zora Post Hook v1 (Base)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for Zora coin pools that sets up multi-position liquidity on pool initialization and, after each swap, collects accrued LP fees, converts them to a backing currency, and distributes rewards to creators, referrers, and the protocol.

hook.name: Loyalty Volatility Dynamic Fee Hook
hook.description: Dynamic LP fee hook that adjusts the swap fee based on recent tick volatility (using configurable gamma and tick-delta threshold) and grants a discount to swappers holding a configured ERC-20 or ERC-721 loyalty token above a threshold. A fixed 0.01% developer fee is extracted from the unspecified currency on every swap via afterSwapReturnsDelta. Fee bounds and loyalty parameters are configurable per pool by the pool owner.

hook.name: ClankerHookDynamicFee
hook.description: A Clanker token launch hook that computes dynamic LP fees based on tick-movement volatility accumulation, charges a 20% protocol fee on the non-Clanker token side of each swap via beforeSwap/afterSwap delta adjustments, and includes an optional MEV protection module active for the first 2 minutes after pool creation.

hook.name: tokens.fun HookDynamicFee
hook.description: Token launchpad hook with volatility-based dynamic fees, MEV protection, and automated LP locking. Used by tokens.fun on Base.

hook.name: ZNS Launchpad
hook.description: A token launchpad hook that sets directional LP fees (separate rates for buying vs. selling the launched token) via updateDynamicLPFee. Includes an optional MEV protection module active for up to 2 minutes after pool creation that can temporarily raise fees, and blocks liquidity additions during the MEV window.

hook.name: Zora Post Hook v1.0.0.1 (Base)
hook.description: A Zora content coin hook that automatically handles fee collection and reward distribution on every swap, converting LP fees to a backing currency and paying out rewards. On pool initialization, it creates multiple Doppler liquidity positions; supports migration to new hook implementations via a registered upgrade gate.

hook.name: WETH Hook
hook.description: A 1:1 ETH/WETH wrapper hook that allows users to swap between ETH and WETH within Uniswap V4 pools. It intercepts swaps to perform native wrapping and unwrapping, blocks direct liquidity operations, and requires pools to be initialized with zero fee.

hook.name: BurnOnSwapHook
hook.description: Burns a configurable percentage (up to 3%) of a designated token on each swap by taking a portion of the swap amount from the pool manager and calling burn() on the token contract. Configuration is per-pool and owner-controlled.

hook.name: Clanker Static Fee Hook v2 (Base)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook used by the Clanker token launch platform that enforces separate fixed LP fees for the clanker token and the paired token, collects a 20% protocol fee on each swap, and supports optional MEV protection modules and pool extensions.

hook.name: SPAWN (Base)
hook.description: SpawnerHook is a Uniswap V4 hook for the SPAWN token ecosystem that takes a configurable fee on each swap and distributes it among token creators, parent token chains, and the protocol. After each swap, it also triggers automatic creation of a new "spawn" token via the Spawner contract.

hook.name: Spot
hook.description: Uniswap v4 hook that computes dynamic LP fees via a truncated geometric oracle (base + surge model), collects a configurable protocol fee share per swap, and auto-reinvests accumulated fees into a full-range liquidity position.

hook.name: JanpuHookStaticFeeV2
hook.description: JANPU Base launchpad hook that applies per-pool static LP fees through Uniswap v4 dynamic-fee updates, collects JANPU protocol fees on launched-token swaps, supports optional MEV fee protection and pool extensions, and accepts empty hook data for standard swaps.

hook.name: CommodityCombinedHook
hook.description: A combined swap and liquidity gating hook for commodity pools. Swap access is gated by a block-number unlock window controlled by a designated locker address, with optional price impact caps. Liquidity provision is restricted to an owner-managed allowlist (with an open-mode override).

hook.name: Flaunch POSM v3 (Base)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that manages the full lifecycle of memecoin token launches ("flaunches") — including a fair launch window, an internal swap pool for fee recycling, a BidWall for ETH liquidity concentration, and configurable fee distribution to creators and referrers.

hook.name: HomelanderUniV4Plugin
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that dynamically overrides the LP fee in beforeSwap (zero for a privileged MEV executor, configurable for all others) and runs on-chain arbitrage in afterSwap by delegating to an external MEV router and executor, distributing captured profits via a configurable profit distributor.

hook.name: DecayMulticurveInitializerHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook by Whetstone Research (Doppler v2) that implements time-based linear LP fee decay, lowering fees from a configurable start rate to an end rate over a set duration. Liquidity additions are gated to a designated initializer contract.

hook.name: DynamicFeeHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook implementing a 14-step dynamic fee schedule (0.03%–1.00%) based on price volatility, with anti-JIT liquidity protection that enforces a 300-block (~10 min) minimum hold period before liquidity can be removed.

hook.name: DopplerHookInitializer
hook.description: Initializes Uniswap v4 pools with multi-curve (bonding curve) liquidity positions, supporting dynamic LP fees and optional DopplerHook callbacks for custom initialization, swap fee collection via afterSwap delta, and pool graduation.

hook.name: Farstr Hook (Base)
hook.description: Collects swap fees via the afterSwapReturnsDelta mechanism with graduated anti-MEV fee tiers (up to 90%) during a cooldown window following NFT sales, distributing collected ETH to a strategy contract and an optional fee-split address. Pool initialization is restricted to a specific strategy token, and liquidity is permanently locked after the first addition.

hook.name: Graduation Hook (Base)
hook.description: Restricts pool initialization to a designated Moxie bonding curve address, ensuring Uniswap v4 pools can only be initialized through the authorized bonding curve as part of a token graduation process.

hook.name: Zora Post Hook v2.3.0 (Base)
hook.description: Uniswap v4 hook for Zora Coins that automatically collects LP fees on every swap, converts them to a backing currency, and distributes rewards — with optional trade referral support via hookData and hook migration managed through a registered upgrade gate.

hook.name: Bonker Static Fee Hook (Base)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for token launches that stores direction-specific LP fees (bonker-side and paired-side) set at initialization, and collects a 20% protocol fee on each swap via beforeSwap and afterSwap delta returns. Includes an optional time-limited MEV-protection module that can temporarily raise fees, and supports configurable pool extensions.

hook.name: Super Strategy
hook.description: An automated liquidity management hook that intercepts a portion of each swap (2% hook fees + 0.3% protocol fees) via beforeSwapReturnsDelta and periodically compounds accumulated fees back into the pool's full-range LP position.

hook.name: Super Strategy
hook.description: A fee-collecting hook that skims a 2.3% fee on each swap (2% hook reserves + 0.3% protocol) via beforeSwapReturnsDelta, accumulating reserves per pool. Pools are registered automatically on initialization. The owner can pause trading and claim LP fees; anyone can trigger liquidity management (minting or adding to positions via Uniswap v4's PositionManager) and receives a 0.1% caller incentive for doing so.

hook.name: Simple Sell Tax Hook
hook.description: Applies a configurable basis-point sell tax when tokens are swapped against ETH or wrapped native assets. The fee is taken from the pool in beforeSwap and sent to a recipient address configured per-token by the token owner.

hook.name: AngstromL2
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for ETH-paired pools that applies MEV-based swap taxes (scaled to gas priority fee) and protocol/creator swap fees, distributes rewards to in-range LPs via tick-based accounting, charges a JIT liquidity MEV tax on adds/removes, and supports a withdraw-only emergency mode controlled by an external factory owner.

hook.name: Angstrom L2
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that extracts a MEV tax from top-of-block (ToB) swaps paid in ETH and distributes it to LPs as rewards, while also applying a JIT liquidity tax on adds and removes to disincentivize just-in-time liquidity provision.

hook.name: GovernedLBPStrategy
hook.description: A Liquidity Bootstrapping Pool (LBP) hook that restricts pool initialization to the contract itself and gates swaps behind a governance-controlled approval, ensuring the migration from an initial token distribution phase to a full-range Uniswap v4 position is authorized before trading begins.

hook.name: Aquinas Hook (Base)
hook.description: Restricts Uniswap v4 pool initialization to factory-authorized Safe addresses for Aquinas DAOs, preventing frontrunning of LP initialization by requiring the caller to be pre-approved by the Aquinas factory.

hook.name: ArtacleIndexHook
hook.description: Non-upgradeable hook that enforces a time-decaying anti-snipe fee mechanism on trades. Charges dynamic fees starting at 95% decaying to 10% on buys, 50% then 10% on sells. Fees distributed: 80% to token contract for NFT acquisitions, 10% to admin, 10% to artblocks.io fund.

hook.name: Clanker Dynamic Fee Hook v2 (Base)
hook.description: A Clanker v2 hook that dynamically adjusts LP fees based on a volatility accumulator derived from simulated tick movement. It also collects a protocol fee on Clanker token swaps and supports optional MEV protection modules and per-pool extensions via custom swap data.

hook.name: Zora Creator Hook v1.1.2 (Base)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for Zora Creator Coins that initializes multi-curve liquidity positions on pool creation and automatically collects LP fees after each swap, converts them to a backing currency, and distributes market rewards to creators and trade referrers. Supports governed liquidity migration to new hook implementations via an upgrade gate contract.

hook.name: UniswapV4MigratorHook
hook.description: A hook that restricts pool initialization to a designated UniswapV4Migrator contract address and emits ModifyLiquidity events after liquidity is added or removed.

hook.name: Clanker Static Fee Hook (Base)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for the Clanker token launch platform that enforces separate, pre-configured LP fees for the clanker token and its paired token by updating the dynamic LP fee on each swap. It collects a 20% protocol fee from paired-token swaps and supports an optional MEV protection module active during the first two minutes after pool creation.

hook.name: HomelanderUniV4Plugin
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that runs on-chain MEV arbitrage after each swap via an external executor contract, applies a configurable dynamic LP fee (waived for the MEV executor address), and registers new pools with an external routing contract on initialization.

hook.name: SETHHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that enables 1:1 wrapping and unwrapping of Superfluid's Native Asset SuperToken (ETHx/SETH) within a pool. It intercepts swaps to handle ETH → ETHx deposits via the SETH upgradeByETH mechanism and ETHx → ETH withdrawals via downgradeToETH, with no liquidity allowed in the pool.

hook.name: sETH Hook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that wraps and unwraps Superfluid's native asset SuperToken (SETH/ETHx) at a 1:1 ratio. It intercepts swaps via `beforeSwap` to perform ETH→ETHx wrapping or ETHx→ETH downgrading directly, returning a `BeforeSwapDelta` to handle pool accounting. Direct liquidity operations are blocked.

hook.name: Zora Post Hook v2.4.0 (Base)
hook.description: Powers the Zora Coins protocol by managing per-coin Uniswap v4 pools with automated multi-curve liquidity provisioning, a decaying launch fee (99% to 1% over 10 seconds), post-swap reward distribution to creators, referrers, and LPs, and a limit-order fill mechanism on tick crossings.

hook.name: Zora Post Hook v1.0.0.2 (Base)
hook.description: Zora's Uniswap v4 hook for content coins that creates multi-curve Doppler liquidity positions on pool initialization, and on every swap collects accrued LP fees, swaps them to the backing currency, and distributes rewards to the protocol, creator, and optional trade referrer encoded in hookData.

hook.name: RehypHook
hook.description: A custom bonding-curve AMM hook that owns all pool liquidity internally, blocking external LP deposits and donations. Swaps exchange WETH/USDC/GHO for REHYP tokens using reserve-based pricing; excess assets are deposited into Aave V3 to earn yield, which can be harvested to increase reserves and burn REHYP supply.

hook.name: Liquid Launch Hook
hook.description: Access-controlled initialization hook for a liquid launch system. Only strategies authorized via a factory may initialize pools. In beforeSwap, automatically converts accumulated protocol fees to the pool's preferred token (token0 or token1) via nested swaps on the same pool; fee claiming is permissionless but always routes to the strategy's designated fee recipient.

hook.name: LiquidLaunchHook
hook.description: A liquid launch hook that restricts pool initialization to authorized strategies via a factory registry, and automatically converts accumulated fees to a preferred token currency during swaps using nested pool swaps.

hook.name: TWAMM Hook (Base)
hook.description: Implements the Time-Weighted Average Market Maker (TWAMM) strategy, allowing users to place long-horizon token swap orders that are executed gradually over time against the AMM. Before each swap, liquidity add, or liquidity remove, the hook executes any pending TWAMM orders up to the current timestamp.

hook.name: ZoraV4CoinHook
hook.description: Uniswap v4 hook for Zora Coins that applies a dynamic launch fee (decaying linearly from 99% to 1% over 10 seconds post-creation) on every swap, then in afterSwap collects accrued LP fees from all positions, converts them to a backing currency via multi-hop paths, and distributes them as market rewards. Also fills limit orders based on tick movement and supports liquidity migration to successor hook versions.

hook.name: ZoraV4CoinHook
hook.description: Powers the Zora Coins protocol by managing per-coin Uniswap v4 pools with automated multi-curve liquidity provisioning, a decaying launch fee (99% to 1% over 10 seconds), and post-swap reward distribution to creators, referrers, and LPs.

hook.name: Flaunch POSM v2 (Base)
hook.description: Flaunch's PositionManager hook manages the full lifecycle of fair-launch memecoins on Uniswap v4, including a fair launch window, internal swap pool for fee conversion, a bid wall for automated buy-side liquidity, and fee distribution to creators, protocol, and optional referrers via hookData.

hook.name: Arrakis Private Hook (Base)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for Arrakis private vaults that restricts liquidity additions to the vault's authorized module and dynamically overrides LP fees per swap direction.

hook.name: TransparentUpgradeableProxy
hook.description: Transparent upgradeable proxy (ERC-1967) that delegates all hook calls to a separate implementation contract. The proxy supports admin-controlled upgrades via upgradeTo/upgradeToAndCall; behavioral properties depend on the unverified implementation.

hook.name: Zora Creator Hook v1 (Base)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for Zora Creator Coins that automatically creates liquidity positions on pool initialization and, on every swap, collects LP fees, swaps them to a backing currency, and distributes rewards to coin creators and trade referrals.

hook.name: BpegHook
hook.description: An afterSwap hook for the BPEG DN-404 token on Base. After each swap, the hook syncs NFT metadata counts with the user's BPEG token balance using tx.origin to identify the end user. Buying BPEG mints NFT metadata proportional to integer balance. Selling BPEG burns NFT metadata accordingly. vanillaSwap: false

hook.name: BpegHook
hook.description: An afterSwap and afterAddLiquidity hook for the BPEG DN-404 token on Base mainnet. afterAddLiquidity sets the pool address on the token contract on first liquidity add. afterSwap syncs NFT metadata count with the user BPEG balance using tx.origin: buying BPEG mints NFT metadata proportional to integer balance, selling burns accordingly. Wallet-to-wallet transfers move NFT metadata alongside tokens. vanillaSwap: false

hook.name: StockTokenHook
hook.description: A hook for stock token pools that enforces configurable trading-hours windows and charges time-decaying buy/sell fees (decaying from a start rate to an end rate over 48 hours from the first trade), redistributing collected fees between a developer wallet and the StockToken vault contract.

hook.name: Zora Post Hook v2.2 (Base)
hook.description: A Zora hook that initializes multi-position Doppler curve liquidity when a Zora coin pool is created, then automatically collects LP fees on every swap, converts them to a backing currency, and distributes rewards to creators, trade referrers, and liquidity providers.

hook.name: Spot
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that applies a dynamic LP fee (base + surge) computed by a DynamicFeeManager, charges a protocol share of swap fees as BeforeSwapDelta/AfterSwapDelta and mints them to a FullRangeLiquidityManager, maintains a truncated geometric mean oracle, and auto-tunes oracle parameters based on tick-movement capping.

hook.name: ClankerHookDynamicFeeV2
hook.description: Clanker's v2 dynamic fee hook that adjusts LP fees based on a tick-difference volatility accumulator, collecting a 20% protocol fee on each swap. Supports optional MEV protection and pool extension modules.

hook.name: HumansHook
hook.description: A minimal hook that calls `xpegToken.start(poolManager)` in `afterInitialize` to register the PoolManager address with the HumansToken (XPEG) contract on first pool initialization. Contains no swap logic; all token transfer restrictions are enforced ERC-20-side in HumansToken._update.

hook.name: ClankerHookStaticFeeV2
hook.description: Clanker V4 hook v2 for autonomous token deployment with fixed LP fee rates, MEV modules, pool extensions, protocol fee, and LP locker fee collection.

hook.name: ArrakisPrivateHook
hook.description: Arrakis Finance private vault hook that restricts liquidity additions to the authorized vault module and overrides LP fees per swap direction (zero-for-one vs one-for-zero) as configured by the vault executor.

hook.name: IQFAntiBotHook
hook.description: Launch-protection hook for IQF/USDT pools with three time-based phases: an anti-snipe window (allowlist-only swaps, per-tx size caps, per-address block cooldowns, and IQF token locks on buys), a cooldown window (open access with higher caps and shorter cooldowns), and a normal phase with no restrictions.

hook.name: V4PermissionedSwaps
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that restricts swaps to an owner-managed allowlist of approved sender addresses, reverting any swap from an unapproved sender with `SenderNotAllowed`.

hook.name: StarbaseHookV2
hook.description: Tax collection hook for the STARBASE V2 STAR/WBNB pool on BNB Chain that collects a 4% STAR tax on every swap: 1% is sent directly to a burn address and 3% (operations + space fund portions) is sent to a tax accumulator contract for distribution, implemented via BeforeSwapDelta and AfterSwapDelta returns.

hook.name: PandaPegHook
hook.description: Updates an on-chain random seed on every swap involving the configured token, using block entropy (timestamp, prevrandao, block number). On first liquidity addition, calls token.start() to initialize the token. The random seed is exposed for use by the paired NFT collection (PandaCollection).

hook.name: ClankerHookDynamicFee
hook.description: Clanker V4 hook for autonomous token deployment with dynamic fees that adjust based on trading volume.

hook.name: LaunchlyBNBHook
hook.description: The hook is used to get the fixed percent fee on every swap to launchaly app admin wallet and send the fee to ClaimRevenue contract (A custom contract for split the fee to creator )

hook.name: BackGeoOracle
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 oracle hook that records TWAP observations and executes automatic backrun swaps to reduce price impact. Requires full-range liquidity positions, exactInput-only swaps, and routers implementing IMsgSender to credit backrun proceeds to the original sender.

hook.name: BackGeoOracle
hook.description: A TWAP oracle hook that maintains price observations for Uniswap v4 pools and automatically executes backrun swaps to mitigate price impact, returning profits in ERC6909 tokens to the original swapper.

hook.name: BVCC Dynamic Fee Hook (BNB)
hook.description: Dynamically adjusts LP fees per swap based on gas price levels, price volatility, and 24-hour trading volume, with an anti-bot cooldown penalty for frequent swappers. Also collects a small hook fee from swap output amounts via afterSwapReturnsDelta.

hook.name: IndexHook
hook.description: A hook for IndexToken pools that gates swaps and liquidity additions/removals to owner-approved pools, supports dynamic LP fees with zero-fee overrides for index token self-swaps and custom hook fees for other swappers, and tracks index token reserves in pools for burn coefficient accounting.

hook.name: LimitOrderHook
hook.description: Records the pre-swap tick in transient storage during beforeSwap, then in afterSwap calls an external LimitOrderManager to execute limit orders based on tick movement. Also exposes an admin-controlled updateDynamicLPFee function to adjust the pool's LP fee.

hook.name: ClankerHookStaticFee
hook.description: Clanker V4 hook for autonomous token deployment with fixed LP fee rates for buys/sells.

hook.name: Spot
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that computes dynamic LP fees via a base+surge pricing model using a truncated geometric oracle, takes a configurable protocol fee share on each swap, and reinvests that share into a full-range liquidity position.

hook.name: ClankerHookStaticFeeV2
hook.description: Clanker token pool hook that applies separate static LP fees per swap direction (buying vs. selling the Clanker token), collects a 20% protocol fee on each swap via BeforeSwapDelta/AfterSwapDelta, and supports an optional MEV protection module that can temporarily raise fees during the first 2 minutes after pool deployment.

hook.name: ClankerHookDynamicFeeV2
hook.description: Clanker V4 hook v2 for autonomous token deployment with dynamic fees that adjust based on trading volume, MEV modules, and pool extensions.

hook.name: Spot
hook.description: Uniswap v4 hook that computes dynamic swap fees (base + surge) from a truncated geometric oracle and charges a configurable protocol fee share per swap, reinvesting it into a full-range liquidity position managed by FullRangeLiquidityManager.

hook.name: Angstrom
hook.description: Angstrom is a decentralized exchange that takes control of its transaction ordering, preventing value extraction from liquidity providers and traders. By running application-specific auctions, Angstrom internalizes MEV and redirects the extracted value back to users, preventing arbitrage losses and sandwich attacks while reducing trading fees and gas.

hook.name: BunniHook
hook.description: Core hook for Bunni v2, a concentrated liquidity protocol on Uniswap v4. Implements a virtual AMM with dynamic fees (TWAP-based + surge detection), am-AMM bidding for LVR/MEV recapture, auto-rebalancing via FloodPlain, and an on-chain price oracle.

hook.name: Nuclear Man's Pool Trader Hook
hook.description: A dynamic fee hook that adjusts LP fees based on volatility by comparing spot price from a Uniswap V2 pair against an exponential moving average filter — keeping fees low during calm markets and raising them up to 25% during high-volatility periods. It also collects a configurable developer fee on each swap.

hook.name: 0XPAIN HOOK
hook.description:
PokemonPegHook is a Uniswap v4 hook that powers PokemonPeg ($pPEG), an art-coin where every buy mints a unique          on-chain pixel-art NFT fragment to the trader.
                                                                                                                          Hook permissions: afterAddLiquidity + afterSwap.

  Mechanism: on each ETH→pPEG swap, the hook resolves the real recipient (via hookData 20b/32b, with tx.origin fallback
  for EOAs) and mints a deterministic ...

hook.name: Action Hook
hook.description: Captures a configurable basis-point fee from BUX/ETH pool swaps, splitting proceeds between an action funding contract (for hourly and daily rewards) and a dev fee splitter via beforeSwap and afterSwap return deltas.

hook.name: UnigenHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that queues NFT mints for qualifying ETH-to-UGEN buyers in afterSwap and applies a reduced 1 bps fee override in beforeSwap for Tier-S wallet-age holders. Includes an admin-controlled whitelist gate for launch-window anti-sniper protection.

hook.name: Ring Few ETH Hook
hook.description: A hook that enables 1:1 wrapping and unwrapping between ETH and fwWETH (Few Wrapped ETH) in Uniswap v4 pools, intercepting swaps via beforeSwap and using delta returns to handle token conversions entirely within the hook.

hook.name: ETIMTaxHook
hook.description: A tax hook for ETIM/ETH swaps that deducts a configurable tax (up to 10%) on buys and sells via beforeSwap. Buy taxes (in ETH) and sell taxes (in ETIM) are held in this contract, with sell taxes split among S6, Foundation, Official, and a burn address. Buys are gated by a governance flag from an external main contract.

hook.name: ETIMTaxHook
hook.description: A buy/sell tax hook for ETIM/ETH pools that deducts configurable tax rates from swap input amounts using return deltas, holding collected ETH and ETIM fees in the contract for owner withdrawal or burn.

hook.name: LivoSwapHook
hook.description: Singleton Uniswap v4 hook for tokens graduated via the Livo launchpad that collects a 0.5% LP fee (split 50/50 between creator and treasury) on all swaps, plus an optional time-limited buy/sell tax configurable per token. Swaps are blocked before token graduation.

hook.name: VortexHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for a VRTX/USDC pool that organizes liquidity into tick-based bands; out-of-range bands have their USDC removed and deposited to Aave to earn yield, which is periodically used to buy and burn VRTX. Charges a 1% fee on USDC-side swaps, restricts liquidity management to the hook itself, and gates public swaps behind an owner-controlled started flag.

hook.name: UsdcWstGbpHook
hook.description: Oracle-aware dynamic-fee hook for a wstGBP/USDC v4 pool that sets LP fees per swap based on directional flow and pool deviation from a Chainlink GBP/USD feed combined with wstGBP NAV price. Swaps are never blocked; an owner pause or oracle failure degrades to a flat fallback fee.

hook.name: FeeHookV3
hook.description: A fee-collection hook for token launch pools that charges ETH-denominated fees on each swap, splitting proceeds among a registered token creator, an optional partner, an optional hot-swappable extension module, and a protocol wallet. Fee rates are determined by a configurable market-cap-tiered table or per-token custom fees with automatic decay.

hook.name: LendingHookV2
hook.description: A V4-native lending AMM that seeds LOOP/ETH liquidity across 100 discrete price bands and skims a 1% swap fee via BeforeSwapDelta/afterSwapReturnsDelta delta accounting. Enables borrowing ETH against LOOP collateral with band-aware liquidation that replenishes the same liquidity band.

hook.name: MoonsendFeeHookEth
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that applies a dynamic LP fee override in `beforeSwap` for pools registered by an owner-controlled factory. Each pool's fee tier is set at registration time from a fixed set of allowed values; unregistered pools receive no override.

hook.name: Ring Few WBTC Hook
hook.description: Enables 1:1 wrapping and unwrapping between a token and its Ring Protocol fewToken wrapper during Uniswap v4 swaps. Validates that pools are formed exclusively between the underlying token and its fewToken counterpart with zero fees.

hook.name: LivoSwapHook
hook.description: A singleton, ownerless Uniswap v4 hook for tokens graduated via LivoGraduatorUniswapV4 that collects LP fees and time-limited buy/sell taxes on ETH/token swaps. Fees are split between a configurable LP fee router (treasury + creator) and the token's master fee handler, with fee amounts determined per-token via ILivoToken.getSwapFees().

hook.name: Upeg
hook.description: Allows the deployer to define SVG data and read it using a specified seed. Stores metadata for collectible ERC-20 tokens. Calls start on the configured token when first liquidity is added, and updates randomSeed on swaps.

hook.name: ReHookHook
hook.description: A tax hook that collects buy and sell fees (up to 3%) on swaps in currency1, routing them to a ReHookLedger that tracks liquidity provider weights for proportional reward distribution. Swaps are gated behind an owner-controlled tradingEnabled flag.

hook.name: VitaHook
hook.description: Uniswap v4 hook that gates trading on official VITA pools until the token is started, applies a time-based tiered dynamic LP fee (decreasing from 5% to 1% over 7 hours), and refreshes a random seed after each swap to support token launch mechanics.

hook.name: AggHook
hook.description: AggHook intercepts swaps via beforeSwapReturnsDelta to route liquidity across multiple registered V3 and V4 pools (including Uniswap V3 and PancakeSwap V3 via swap callbacks), performing multi-hop execution and charging a protocol fee via the pool manager's donate function. Routing data and pool addresses are baked into the contract bytecode; add-liquidity and initialization are restricted to an admin address (tx.origin check).

hook.name: ArrakisPrivateHook
hook.description: Arrakis private vault hook that restricts liquidity additions to the authorized module and overrides LP fees per swap direction, configurable by the vault executor.

hook.name: FeeHook
hook.description: Accumulates swap fees from a Uniswap v4 pool and distributes collected ETH to vMooney token holders who perform weekly check-ins, proportional to their vMooney balance. After each swap, non-native tokens collected as fees are burned to the dead address.

hook.name: Ring FewV2 Direct Routing Hook
hook.description: Ownerless Uniswap v4 hook that exposes Ring FewV2 direct-pair liquidity through v4 swaps. The hook wraps the input token into its canonical FewToken, swaps through the corresponding FewV2 pair, unwraps the output token, and settles back through PoolManager. It does not require or decode custom hookData, does not allow liquidity in the v4 pool, and has no hook owner, pause, upgrade path, or route-control admin.

hook.name: DiamondHandsHook
hook.description: Anti-dump hook for a single DMND/WETH pool that charges 0% on buys and a dynamic 0.5–10% fee on sells, scaling with 1h rolling sell pressure via integral pricing. Captured fees are split 50/30/20 between a MerkleDistributor jackpot for DMND holders, WETH→DMND buyback-and-burn, and direct LP donations via poolManager.donate().

hook.name: MoonCatsStrategyHookV2
hook.description: Fee-collecting hook that takes configurable buy/sell fees (up to 10%, or 50% for the first hour post-launch) after each swap via afterSwapReturnsDelta, converts token fees to ETH through a nested pool swap, and distributes proceeds 80% to a strategy contract and 20% to a marketing wallet. Pool initialization and liquidity addition are restricted to the strategy contract.

hook.name: STRMOGHook
hook.description: Accrues a 10% fee on all swaps in a designated ETH/STRMOG pool, routing collected fees to an immutable treasury address. Fees are captured inline via swap delta returns in beforeSwap and afterSwap, and can be swept to treasury by any caller, with an optional 0.3% bounty to the sweep initiator.

hook.name: QuasarHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that burns 1% of its own QUASAR/PRISM token on every swap (taken via beforeSwap/afterSwap return deltas) and distributes 4% LP fees to rank-weighted NFT holders. Each whole QUASAR token unit held automatically mints a corresponding facet NFT, with earlier-minted facets assigned higher rank-based weights for proportionally greater fee shares.

hook.name: CumHook
hook.description: Dynamic LP fee hook that adjusts fees based on cumulative price impact (CPI) across swaps. Fees scale with directional market imbalance and time-decay between swaps; each pool must be explicitly configured with fee bounds, decay parameters, and illiquidity scale before trading is permitted.

hook.name: StratHook
hook.description: A fee-taking hook for the $STRAT/wETH pool that levies a 2% fee on all swaps, routing wETH fees to a reserve and burning STRAT fees to maintain a monotone-increasing price floor (N = reserve/supply). Includes a permissionless `defend()` function that uses reserve wETH to market-buy and burn STRAT when TWAP price falls below the floor, and blocks LP additions below the floor price.

hook.name: ArkHook
hook.description: Charges configurable buy and sell fees on each swap via afterSwapReturnsDelta, taking the fee from the pool manager and routing it to an external fee router. Optionally triggers on-chain maintenance calls (buyback or harbor reinforcement) after each swap.

hook.name: BossHook
hook.description: A gamified Uniswap v4 hook that turns swaps into a boss-fight: buys deal USD-denominated damage and roll for collectible item drops, sells heal the boss. Active curses apply additional fees (taken via BeforeSwapDelta/AfterSwapDelta) on sellers or buyers; LP fee is fixed at 1% via a beforeSwap fee override.

hook.name: BtcPegHook
hook.description:
Mints $bPEG fragments to swap recipients on the ETH/bPEG v4 pool. Calls token.start when first liquidity is added (afterAddLiquidity). Resolves the real EOA recipient on each swap (afterSwap) via hookData (20-byte address override) or tx.origin fallback for routers, then calls BtcPeg.mintFragmentsFor to give the buyer one on-chain fragment per whole bPEG bought. Read-only on the swap path otherwise (no fee, no delta).
