hook.name: GeodeMiningHook
hook.description: A token launch hook that tracks WETH buy volume per round to allocate mining rewards to buyers, accrues a 3% fee on all WETH swaps (split between burns and protocol), and automatically executes token buybacks triggered by sell pressure.

hook.name: LiquidGuard
hook.description: Uniswap v4 hook that skims a configurable fee (in RARE tokens) from every swap in RARE-paired pools, routing the fee to a distributor contract. When RARE is the specified currency, fees are deducted in beforeSwap; when unspecified, in afterSwap. Pool initialization is restricted to owner-approved initializer addresses.

hook.name: PAMHook
hook.description: ETH-side fee collector for the Perpetual Asteroid Machine token; converts fees to ASTEROID and distributes to PAM holders

hook.name: FullRangeLBPStrategy
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook implementing a Liquidity Bootstrapping Pool strategy that restricts pool initialization to the contract itself via beforeInitialize, then migrates raised funds and reserved tokens into a full-range liquidity position after the auction concludes.

hook.name: AggHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that automatically routes swaps across multiple registered liquidity uniswapV3like pools from Uniswap, Pancakeswap, Sushiswap, Aerodrome, etc. By discovering and executing the most efficient path at transaction time, it allows traders to access deeper aggregated liquidity, improve price execution, and reduce the effects of liquidity fragmentation.

hook.name: STRPNKHook
hook.description: Charges a 10% fee on every swap by intercepting beforeSwap and afterSwap, accumulating ETH and token fees as ERC-6909 claims held by the PoolManager. Fees can be swept by anyone and distributed to a treasury and dev wallet (80/20 split for ETH, all to treasury for tokens), with a 0.25% bounty paid to the caller who triggers the sweep.

hook.name: CustomHook
hook.description: Hook for applying a dynamic (changeable) fee for any pool the hook works with. On each swap, it calls poolManager.updateDynamicLPFee() with an admin-configurable fee rate, and is deployed behind a TransparentUpgradeableProxy.

hook.name: Tetris Custom Dynamic Fee Hook
hook.description: An upgradeable proxy hook that calls poolManager.updateDynamicLPFee() on every swap to enforce a configurable LP fee percentage. The fee and admin address are set at initialization and can be updated by the admin.

hook.name: FWATokenHook
hook.description: ETH/FWAToken pool hook that charges a flat 1% fee on all swaps, routing collected fees to an owner-set address (buys: fee in FWAToken swapped to ETH via internal pool swap; sells: fee in ETH). Pool initialization and liquidity addition are gated on the token's transient launching() flag; buy access is governance-controlled via an owner-toggled externalBuysEnabled flag.

hook.name: Meme Strategy Hook (Ethereum)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for the MEMS meme token that collects dynamic asymmetric swap fees (Phase 1: 50%, Phase 2: 10–90%) on ETH↔MEMS swaps, splitting proceeds 80/20 between a strategy contract and treasury. Includes anti-snipe protection that blocks public swaps until trading is activated by the strategy.

hook.name: SummerHook
hook.description: Uniswap v4 hook for the Summer protocol that gates pool initialization to the Launchpad, enforces full-range LP positions, and charges a 0.25% protocol fee on each swap's unspecified-currency side via afterSwapReturnsDelta. Also runs a 4-week SUMMER token farming program with vesting for LP stakers and a Founders Pool for Genesis Badge holders.

hook.name: LendingHookV3
hook.description: A lending AMM hook that manages a full-range ETH/ERC20 V4 LP position as a shared vault. LPs deposit and earn swap fees; borrowers draw ETH against TOKEN collateral at 40% LTV; a 0.5% protocol fee is skimmed from each swap via BeforeSwapDelta/AfterSwapDelta hooks, and swaps are blocked in any block where a liquidation occurred.

hook.name: Ring FewV2 Aggregator Hook
hook.description: Ownerless router-compatible Uniswap v4 hook that exposes Ring FewV2 AMM liquidity through v4 swaps. The hook uses empty hookData, registers aggregator pools, exposes quote and pseudoTotalValueLocked for routing discovery, and has no hook owner, pause, upgrade path, or route-control admin.

hook.name: ETIMTaxHook
hook.description: A tax hook for the ETIM token that deducts configurable buy and sell taxes from each swap via BeforeSwapDelta, distributing sell-side taxes to foundation, S6, official, and burn allocations. Buys are gated behind a growth-pool depletion check and only exact-input swaps are supported.

hook.name: ETIM Tax Hook
hook.description: Applies a configurable buy/sell tax (up to 10%) on ETIM swaps via BeforeSwapDelta; buy tax is collected in ETH (currency0), sell tax is split among a burn address, S6 rewards, a foundation wallet, and an official wallet. Buys are blocked until a governance flag (isGrowthPoolDepleted on the main contract) is set; exempt addresses bypass taxation. afterSwap currently returns a zero delta.

hook.name: LendingHookV4
hook.description: A lending AMM hook that manages a single full-range ETH/TOKEN LP position as an ERC4626-style vault, allowing LPs to deposit and borrowers to take ETH loans against TOKEN collateral at 40% LTV. Skims a 0.5% protocol swap fee via beforeSwap/afterSwap delta returns and blocks swaps in the same block as a liquidation.

hook.name: SharesHook
hook.description: Collects protocol fees (2.5% each) on buy and sell swaps for a designated native/token pool, updates an on-chain random seed on each swap, and notifies an external launch controller of swap activity. Triggers a token start on first liquidity addition once config is finalized.

hook.name: UniswapV4KEMHook
hook.description: Validates signed quotes from a designated signer before each exact-input swap, enforcing nonce-based replay protection, a max amount-in, and an expiry time. In afterSwap, any output exceeding the quoted max exchange rate is captured as ERC-6909 tokens for a configured recipient.

hook.name: StableStableHook
hook.description: Dynamic fee hook for stable/stable pools that adjusts LP fees based on price deviation from a configurable reference price. Fees decay exponentially when the pool price is outside the optimal range, incentivizing arbitrage back to peg while charging reduced fees for stabilizing swaps.

hook.name: PokemonPegHook
hook.description: Pokémon Peg ($pPEG) v4 hook. Mints NFT fragment metadata (one Pokémon per fragment) on every buy, proportional to pPEG received. Resolves the recipient address from hookData (20- or 32-byte) or falls back to tx.origin for contract callers. Calls start() on the token on first liquidity addition and randomises the RNG seed on each afterSwap.

hook.name: UniLandHook
hook.description:
UniLand is a 10,000-plot lottery meme coin powered by a Uniswap v4 hook. Each whole $ULand token (1e18) maps 1:1 to a numbered plot in [1..10000] via a lazy Fisher-Yates shuffle inside the ERC20. On every sell, the hook's afterSwap takes 3% of the output ETH, draws a random plot id, and forwards the ETH directly to that plot's owner. Free plots fall back to the treasury. Buys are tax-free. Hook permissions: afterSwap | afterSwapReturnDelta (bottom-14 = 0x44).

Site: https://unilandhooks.fun

hook.name: JrnyHook
hook.description: A protocol-fee hook for ETH-paired Uniswap v4 pools that intercepts swaps to collect a configurable fee on each trade, including a time-decaying "shock fee" window that ramps down from a maximum to a base rate. Collected ETH fees accumulate and are automatically distributed to owner-configured receiver addresses when a minimum threshold is reached.

hook.name: Ring Few USDC Hook
hook.description: A hook that facilitates seamless 1:1 wrapping and unwrapping of an ERC20 token and its Ring Few-wrapped counterpart (fewToken) within a Uniswap v4 pool, intercepting swaps in beforeSwap to perform the wrap or unwrap operation and returning a delta to settle the exchange.

hook.name: Ring Few UNI Hook
hook.description: A hook that enables atomic wrapping and unwrapping of Few Protocol wrapper tokens within Uniswap v4 swaps, enforcing a 1:1 exchange rate between an ERC20 token and its fewToken equivalent.

hook.name: StrategyPunkHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that charges a time-decaying fee on swaps (starting at 95% for buys, declining 100 bips per 5 blocks to a 10% floor), collecting fees in ETH via nested pool swaps when needed, routing 80% to a companion StrategyPunk contract and 20% to a fee address. Liquidity operations are gated to the companion StrategyPunk contract.

hook.name: Cork AMM (Ethereum)
hook.description: Cork AMM is a custom Uniswap v4 hook for the Cork Protocol that implements a specialized AMM for depeg-swap token pairs (RA and CT). It replaces the standard Uniswap price curve with its own pricing logic, gates all native liquidity modifications through the hook's own interface, and supports optional flash swaps via a CorkSwapCallback pattern.

hook.name: BloomHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook implementing queue-based sell access control for its native BLOOM token. Buyers are automatically enqueued and only the queue head (or Bloom Pass NFT holders) may sell; idle heads suffer linear token decay. LP fees are distributed to Bloom Pass holders proportionally by weight.

hook.name: LimitOrderHook
hook.description:
A deployment of OpenZeppelin's LimitOrderHook — a Uniswap v4 hook implementing single-tick limit orders. Users place orders by providing concentrated liquidity at a specific tick; when the pool price crosses that tick, the position is automatically filled and can be withdrawn at any time.

Original implementation by OpenZeppelin (github.com/OpenZeppelin/uniswap-hooks). Deployed to Ethereum mainnet to make this functionality publicly accessible.

hook.name: Auto Liquidity Generator Hook
hook.description: LiquidityGenHook collects configurable buy and sell WETH taxes on swaps via BeforeSwapDelta and AfterSwapDelta, accumulates them, and automatically re-invests into the pool as full-range liquidity once a threshold is reached. A platform fee is taken before the liquidity add.

hook.name: Auto Liquidity Generator
hook.description: Collects configurable buy and sell taxes (in WETH) on every swap. Once accumulated fees reach a configurable threshold, deducts a platform fee (20–50% of the accumulated amount) sent to a designated collector, then uses the remainder to buy the paired token and add full-range protocol-owned liquidity. Residual tokens after liquidity addition are burned.

hook.name: WETH Hook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that enables seamless ETH/WETH wrapping and unwrapping within v4 pools at a 1:1 ratio. It intercepts swaps to deposit or withdraw ETH from the WETH contract in-flight, supporting both exact input and exact output swaps, while blocking liquidity operations since the pool serves purely as a conversion mechanism.

hook.name: NestHook
hook.description: A liquidity mining hook that distributes EGG token rewards to LPs proportional to their contributed liquidity in a single canonical pool. Reward accrual is triggered on each swap and liquidity modification, with per-position tracking and support for excluding burned (dead-address) liquidity from reward distributions.

hook.name: TokenWorks Hook v5
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for NFT-backed range liquidity pools that validates pool initialization with an NFT collection, restricts liquidity additions to the NFTStrategyFactory, and takes a dynamic swap fee on behalf of NFT strategy holders via afterSwap delta returns.

hook.name: RecursiveStrategyHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for NFT strategy pools (by TokenWorks) that collects fees on every swap via afterSwapReturnsDelta: buy fees start at 99% at deployment and decrease 100 bps per minute to a 10% floor; sell fees are a constant 10%. Collected fees are distributed 80% to the NFT strategy collection, ~8% to PunkStrategy for buy-and-burn, ~2% to TokenWorks, and the remainder to a deployer-specified address.

hook.name: LivoSwapHook
hook.description:

1. **LP fee (1%)** — hardcoded as `LP_FEE_BPS = 100`. Charged on every swap, split 50/50 between token creator and protocol treasury.
2. **Sell/buy tax** — read dynamically per-token from `ILivoToken(tokenAddress).getTaxConfig()`, which returns a `TaxConfig` struct with `buyTaxBps`, `sellTaxBps`, `taxDurationSeconds`, and `graduationTimestamp`. Tax is time-limited (on...

hook.name: FairTradeHook
hook.description: Anti-MEV hook that blocks swaps from owner-blocklisted addresses, reverts same-block swaps from the same sender (sandwich detection), and enforces a configurable per-address timestamp cooldown between swaps.

hook.name: ArtCoinsHookSkimFee
hook.description: Uniswap v4 hook for ArtCoins token launches that skims a per-swap fee from swap volume and splits it three ways: a bounty leg, a protocol leg, and an optional referral leg. Implements a dynamic LP fee and an anti-sniper decay window that blocks public LP additions while the skim rate is elevated above its baseline.

hook.name: Unigen Hook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for an ETH/UGEN pool that queues NFT mints for qualifying buyers via commit-reveal entropy in afterSwap. Applies a dynamic LP fee override (1 bps) for Tier-S wallet-age holders in beforeSwap, and includes a governance-controlled whitelist gate for the launch window.

hook.name: Clanker Static Fee Hook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for the Clanker token launchpad that enforces per-pool static LP fees configured at initialization, collects protocol fees on the paired token, and supports optional MEV-protection modules and pool extensions.

hook.name: Strategic Reserve Hook
hook.description: Manages fee collection and distribution for Strategic Reserve ETH/token pools, implementing a time-decaying buy fee that starts high (up to 80%) and decreases to a configurable floor (4-10%), with fees distributed to reserve contracts and protocol recipients.

hook.name: DragonXHook
hook.description: Uniswap v4 hook implementing limit orders, a truncated geometric mean price oracle, and a 10% tax on market sells (ETH output) distributed to configurable genesis wallets and a buy-and-stake contract.

hook.name: TaxHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that applies configurable buy and sell taxes on a designated token (boomToken) across pools, collecting a global team fee and per-pool dev fee on both inflows and outflows, while zeroing LP fees via a fee override in beforeSwap.

hook.name: TaxHook
hook.description: Collects configurable buy and sell taxes on swaps involving the boom.fun BOOM token, splitting fees between a global team address and per-pool developer addresses. Overrides LP fees to zero and applies custom basis-point tax rates via beforeSwap (sell-side) and afterSwap (buy-side) delta returns.

hook.name: ProofOfSwapHook
hook.description: An afterSwap hook for the canonical ETH/SWAPOSHI pool that records each swapper's ETH volume as mining weight per 10-minute epoch. Swappers can claim pro-rata SWAPOSHI token rewards for finalized epochs, with Bitcoin-style halving every ~30 days (~4320 epochs) until the 21M cap.

hook.name: Token Flow Tax Hook (Ethereum)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that applies configurable taxes on TOKEN/ETH swaps, collecting native ETH taxes on both inflows and outflows. Supports multiple tokens sharing one hook, with a configurable owner cut of all taxes collected.

hook.name: Ring Few WSTETH Hook (Ethereum)
hook.description: Wraps and unwraps wstETH (a Few-wrapped token) on-the-fly during Uniswap v4 swaps, enabling seamless 1:1 conversion between the underlying ERC20 and its Few-wrapped counterpart in a zero-fee pool.

hook.name: SlopPoolHook
hook.description: A fee-collecting hook for the ETH/SLOP pool that applies a block-number-decaying launch fee on ETH→SLOP buys and a fixed 2% fee on SLOP→ETH sells, distributing ETH proceeds between a buy-and-void receiver and a team address.

hook.name: CMDHook
hook.description: Uniswap v4 hook for the CMD (Ten Commandments) token that collects buy and sell fees in afterSwap, implements an anti-sniper launch decay, an adaptive sell dampener (volume-based surcharge), and a per-user cooldown surcharge. Fee proceeds are routed to a fee address, a buyback address, and a companion CMDCommandments contract that manages a locked LP position and periodic buy-and-burn cycles.

hook.name: HookdRandomHook
hook.description: Records a rolling keccak256 seed per ERC3232 token after each swap, combining swap parameters and block context. ERC3232 tokens query this seed for on-chain randomness during token generation. Pool initialization is factory-gated to prevent unauthorized price setting.

hook.name: Plot
hook.description: An ERC-20 token that is its own Uniswap v4 hook, implementing a gamified "war economy." Every swap incurs a fixed 5% tribute on the output side: buys burn PLOT tokens (deflationary), sells split ETH 60/40 between a continuous holder-score stream and a 30-minute epoch war chest contested by three factions (Marches) competing for territory.

hook.name: LendingHookV4
hook.description: A full-range ETH/TOKEN Uniswap v4 LP vault with integrated lending: LPs deposit to earn swap fees and origination fees, borrowers lock TOKEN collateral to borrow ETH at 40% LTV, and a 0.5% protocol fee is skimmed from every swap via BeforeSwapDelta and AfterSwapDelta. Includes borrow/repay/liquidate mechanics with a manipulation-resistant price snapshot system.

hook.name: Ring Few CBBTC Hook
hook.description: Enables atomic 1:1 wrapping and unwrapping between an ERC20 token and its Few-wrapped equivalent within Uniswap v4 swaps, intercepting beforeSwap to perform the wrap/unwrap and returning the delta directly without going through the pool AMM.

hook.name: Ring Few DAI Hook (Ethereum)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that enables seamless wrapping and unwrapping of Few Token (fewToken) during swaps at a 1:1 ratio. It intercepts swaps to wrap the underlying ERC20 token into fewToken or unwrap fewToken back to the underlying token, validating that the pool only contains the wrapper and underlying token pair with zero fees.

hook.name: Ring Few WEETH Hook (Ethereum)
hook.description: A 1:1 wrapping/unwrapping hook for Ring Protocol's Few Wrapped WEETH token on Uniswap v4, enabling seamless swaps between WEETH and its few-wrapped variant. The hook intercepts swaps to atomically wrap or unwrap tokens using BeforeSwapDelta, and validates pool initialization to ensure only the wrapper/underlying pair with zero fee is permitted.

hook.name: FullRangeLBPStrategy
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook implementing a Liquidity Bootstrapping Pool (LBP) migration strategy. Uses `beforeInitialize` to restrict pool initialization to the contract itself, then migrates token sale proceeds and reserve tokens into a full-range v4 liquidity position after the LBP auction concludes.

hook.name: LaunchHook
hook.description: LaunchHook is the fee-collection hook used by the Tickr launchpad. It charges a flat 2% fee on every swap (taken from input ETH on buys via beforeSwap and from output ETH on sells via afterSwap) and splits it 50/50 between the token's creator — the holder of the corresponding TickrOwner NFT — and the platform. Fee constants and the creator/platform split are immutable; the only governor action is a one-time setFactory(...) binding.

hook.name: JrnyHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for ETH/token pools that collects a configurable protocol fee on every swap, with support for time-decaying "shock fees" that taper from a maximum rate to a baseline over a configured window. Accumulated ETH fees are automatically distributed to registered receivers when a minimum threshold is reached.

hook.name: LodeHook
hook.description:
A Uniswap v4 hook that captures top-of-block LVR and routes it through a per-pool splitter

The first swap of each block on an opted-in pool pays an additional premium scaled by `premiumBps`. Subsequent swaps in the same block pay only standard pool fees. A `minAuctionInputSize` floor defeats dust-disarm attacks, sub-economic swaps skip the auction slot without consuming it.

Safety.
- Pause guardian (separate multisig, kills capture globally in one tx)
- Per-pool deactivation
- 24h timelock ...

hook.name: Aegis
hook.description: AegisHook applies dynamic swap fees sourced from an external DynamicFeeManager, updates a TWAP oracle on each swap, charges a configurable hook fee on every trade (taken as a BeforeSwapDelta/AfterSwapDelta), and periodically reinvests accumulated fees as full-range liquidity via an AegisEngine on a 1-hour cooldown.

hook.name: NFTStrategyHook
hook.description: Manages ETH/token pools for NFTStrategy NFT collections on Uniswap v4. Takes a time-decreasing buy fee (starting at 99%, decreasing 100 bps/minute to a floor of 10%) and a fixed 10% sell fee via afterSwapReturnsDelta, distributing proceeds 80% to the NFT collection, 10% to a protocol token buyback, and 10% to a fee address.

hook.name: OnlyHooksHook
hook.description: Takes a fee (default 1%) on the output token of every swap via afterSwapReturnsDelta, routing 50% to the treasury and 50% split evenly among the trader's active creator beneficiaries per SubscriptionRegistry. Unsubscribed traders send the full creator share to treasury. Trader identity is decoded from hookData if present, otherwise falls back to tx.origin; empty hookData never reverts.

hook.name: EMADynamicFeeHook
hook.description: EMA-based dynamic fee hook for Uniswap V4. Calculates swap fees using Exponential Moving Average of price, with 30-step fee schedule (0.01%-3.00%) and 300-block anti-JIT protection via tx.origin. No owner, no admin functions, fully immutable.

hook.name: CabalcoinHook
hook.description: Charges a fixed fee (initially 3%, reducible by the Cabalcoin owner) on each swap via afterSwapReturnsDelta, converting non-ETH fees to ETH through an internal nested swap. Gates pool initialization and liquidity addition to a controlled loadingLiquidity phase enforced by the Cabalcoin token contract; afterSwap also requires the caller to implement IValidRouter.

hook.name: LendingHookV4
hook.description: ERC4626-style ETH/TOKEN LP vault with embedded lending: LPs deposit to earn swap fees, borrowers post TOKEN collateral for ETH loans at 40% LTV, and liquidators close underwater positions. The hook skims a 0.5% protocol fee on every swap via BeforeSwapDelta/AfterSwapDelta, and blocks swaps in any block that contained a liquidation.

hook.name: LitePSM Aggregator Hook (DAI)
hook.description: Aggregator hook that routes USDC/DAI (or USDC/USDS) swaps through a MakerDAO LitePSM contract, bypassing Uniswap pool liquidity entirely. Uses beforeSwapReturnsDelta to intercept and settle swaps at PSM pricing; blocks direct liquidity addition to the pool.

hook.name: LitePSM Aggregator Hook USDS
hook.description: Routes USDC↔USDS (or DAI) swaps through a MakerDAO LitePSM by intercepting beforeSwap and returning a BeforeSwapDelta, bypassing the standard AMM curve entirely. Liquidity addition is blocked; the hook enforces one canonical pool per gem/stable token pair.

hook.name: UniversalKlikHook
hook.description: A tiered tax hook for ETH/token pools that takes buy and sell fees scaled by the token's market cap (queried from a factory oracle). Fee revenue is split between a platform treasury and the token's creator address using beforeSwapReturnsDelta and afterSwapReturnsDelta; exactOutput sells are blocked.

hook.name: UCatHook
hook.description:
Custom v4 hook for UniCat — a production v4 hook combined with an ERC-721 NFT collection (888 hard cap) and staking miner on Ethereum mainnet.

Hook capabilities:
- afterAddLiquidity: one-time initialization trigger that calls token.start() on the first liquidity event involving the UCat token
- afterSwap: re-randomizes a global seed used as entropy for on-chain SVG NFT generation when wallets first receive UCat

Integrates with:
- UCat ERC-20 (0x36608E64D5391bF40486EC81886308a6b8bC06a5)
- UC...

hook.name: DeployerTaxHook
hook.description: Charges a configurable buy/sell tax (up to 15% hardcap) on exact-input swaps for a single token pool by returning a BeforeSwapDelta, accumulating fees as ERC6909 claim tokens on the PoolManager and draining them to a developer wallet via drainFees().

hook.name: HyperVolatileHook
hook.description: An exponential bonding-curve JIT-liquidity hook that maintains three concentrated positions (active, display-high, display-low) per pool. Before each swap, it burns all existing positions and remints an active position sized to the trade per the curve, plus display positions flanking it; after the swap it updates the curve state and vault accounting.

hook.name: PerpetualHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for the PerpetualMeme token launchpad that applies a time-decaying buy fee (starting at 95%, decaying to a 10% floor over blocks) and a fixed 10% sell fee. Fees are collected via afterSwapReturnsDelta, with 80% deposited to the PerpetualMeme contract and 20% sent to a protocol fee address. Pool initialization and liquidity additions are restricted to the PerpetualFactory.

hook.name: KanroHook
hook.description:
KANRO is a Uniswap v4 hook designed to route 3% of swap volume from supported pools directly to humanitarian and public-good initiatives on Ethereum.

3% of swap volume is automatically routed on-chain to the Kanro Fund, Vitalik Buterin’s charitable initiative supporting humanitarian relief, public health, and open-source public goods

Funds connected to the Kanro ecosystem have supported:

Pandemic and public health initiatives
Open-source biotech and longevity research
Humanitarian relief e...

hook.name: ERC20StrategyHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for ERC20Strategy pools that takes time-based buy fees (starting at 99%, decreasing 1% per minute to a floor of 10%) and distributes collected fees among the strategy contract (80%), PunkStrategy token (10%), and a configurable protocol fee address (10%). Pool creation and liquidity addition are restricted to the ERC20StrategyFactory.

hook.name: 999WHL Hook
hook.description: Takes 10% buy and sell fee, used to buy digits ENS NFTs. Same flywheel as NFTStrategy.

hook.name: ENSWheelHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for ENSWheel token launches that gates pool initialization and liquidity adds to factory-authorized contexts, enforces a governance-controlled tradingEnabled flag on swaps, and extracts a time-decaying buy fee (95%→10% over blocks) via afterSwapReturnsDelta, distributing 80% to the ENSWheel collection and 20% to a team address.

hook.name: UniagentHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that levies a 1% fee (100 bps) on the WETH side of each swap, taking WETH from the pool manager, unwrapping it to ETH, and distributing it across a reward vault (50%), an AI funding wallet (30%), and a dev wallet (20%) on a weekly epoch schedule.

hook.name: ArtCoinsHookStaticFeeV2
hook.description: Uniswap v4 hook for ArtCoins pools that enforces per-direction static LP fees (configurable buy vs. sell rates), collects protocol fees via BeforeSwapDelta/AfterSwapDelta, supports a time-limited anti-sniper MEV module, and dispatches post-swap callbacks to pluggable pool extensions.

hook.name: WstETHHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that enables seamless wrapping and unwrapping between stETH and wstETH during swaps, applying the dynamic stETH/wstETH exchange rate in beforeSwap and settling token deltas directly with the pool manager. Liquidity additions are blocked; all exchange is handled exclusively through the hook.

hook.name: SpyHook
hook.description: Passes ordinary swaps through with zero fee impact; when the designated SpyBatch settler swaps with non-empty hookData, takes a 1% fee (COVERT_FEE_BPS) from the input currency and routes it to a vault address for burning.

hook.name: CellHook
hook.description: CellHook is simultaneously the $CELL ERC-20 token and its own Uniswap v4 hook. After each swap, it takes a 7% fee on the unspecified currency: CELL-side fees are 100% burned for deflation, while ETH-side fees are distributed as ETH yield to token holders and fund a randomized, volume-paced token-elimination mechanism.

hook.name: Hash
hook.description: An ERC20 token (HASH) that is also its own Uniswap v4 hook, managing an ETH/HASH pool with a 1% swap fee captured via BeforeSwapDelta and AfterSwapDelta return values. Includes a genesis sale phase, proof-of-work token mining, and a governance gate that blocks swaps until the genesis pool is seeded.

hook.name: HaloHook
hook.description: HaloHook implements a phase-based ETH tax system for a token launch, extracting 3–30% from buys and sells via hook deltas with a time-decaying ignition period. Buy taxes are partially accrued as claimable refunds, released only if the buyer holds their token position for a minimum block window after purchase.

hook.name: M0 Allowlist Hook
hook.description: An access-control hook that restricts swaps to allowlisted addresses using the Predicate authorization system and restricts liquidity provision to approved providers; donations are blocked.

hook.name: UnicurveHook
hook.description: A factory-gated hook for the Unicurve memecoin launchpad that blocks swaps and liquidity additions until the meme token graduates, as indicated by `transfersEnabled()` on the token contract. Pool initialization is restricted to the factory address.

hook.name: V4AlphaHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that restricts pool initialization to the contract owner and gates swaps and liquidity additions via a per-pool start timestamp, allowing the owner to schedule when trading begins.

hook.name: LendingHookV2
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook implementing a range-aware lending AMM (lo0p protocol) that seeds the pool with single-sided LOOP token liquidity across multiple price bands, skims a fixed 1% fee on all swaps via BeforeSwapDelta/AfterSwapDelta, and enforces a same-block liquidation lockout. Supports borrow, repay, and liquidation operations tied to concentrated liquidity bands.

hook.name: BackGeoOracle
hook.description: A TWAP oracle hook with built-in backrun protection that records on-chain price observations and automatically executes reverse swaps after large price-impact trades to restore the pool price toward the geometric mean, crediting the original swapper with ERC6909 tokens.

hook.name: BackGeoOracle
hook.description: An oracle hook for Uniswap v4 that records TWAP price observations and executes backrun protection after large swaps. When tick movement exceeds a threshold, the hook performs an inverse counter-swap and credits recovered value to the user as ERC-6909 tokens via the router's `msgSender()` interface.

hook.name: Spot
hook.description: A dynamic fee hook that charges a base fee derived from oracle tick volatility and a time-decaying surge fee during high-volatility periods; a configurable protocol share of swap fees is minted to a full-range liquidity manager for reinvestment.

hook.name: DeathSTRHookV2
hook.description: A hook for an ETH/ckToken pool that enforces exact-input-only swaps, wraps all pool operations with token-level reentrancy guards (enterSwap/exitSwap), and collects a configurable fee (default 10%, max 20%) on each swap by taking the output token, optionally swapping it to ETH via a nested pool swap, and forwarding proceeds to a DeathSTRCollector fee contract.

hook.name: AccessControlDynamicFeeHook
hook.description: Restricts liquidity provision to the owner and a whitelist of approved addresses, and dynamically overrides the LP fee for all swaps to a value configurable by the owner.

hook.name: PDAIBurnHook
hook.description: Burns 1% of pDAI on every swap in a WETH/pDAI Uniswap v4 pool. beforeSwap handles the specified side and afterSwap handles the unspecified side, each taking pDAI from the pool manager and sending it to address(0xdEaD) via return deltas. Burn failures are silently ignored so swaps always proceed. No admin, no upgrades, all addresses hardcoded.

hook.name: UniversalKlikHook
hook.description: A fee-extracting hook for ETH-paired pools that charges tiered buy/sell fees (0.35–1.25%) based on market cap fetched from an external factory contract. Fees are split between a platform treasury and the token contract via delta adjustments. No fees are charged on the pool's deployment block.

hook.name: Ring Few USDT Hook
hook.description: Wraps and unwraps USDT to/from fewUSDT (Ring Protocol's wrapped token) automatically during swaps in Uniswap v4 pools, performing 1:1 conversions and absorbing the full swap delta via beforeSwapReturnsDelta.

hook.name: TokenWorks Hook v2
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for NFTStrategy trading pools that applies time-decaying buy fees (starting at 99% and decreasing to 10% as blocks accumulate) and a flat 10% sell fee, collecting fees via afterSwap delta returns and distributing them to configured recipients.

hook.name: PrismHook
hook.description: DN404-style ERC20/ERC721 hybrid token (PRISM, 5,000 supply) that manages a single Uniswap v4 ETH/PRISM pool. Each whole token held auto-mints an NFT; LP fees harvested from the hook's own position are distributed pro-rata to NFT holders. The afterSwap callback is a pure no-op.

hook.name: DEPHIHook
hook.description: Implements asymmetric block-decaying swap taxes: buy tax starts at 99% and decays to 10% over ~445 blocks (100 bps per 5 blocks), sell tax is constant 10%. Fees are skimmed in afterSwap, converted to ETH via an internal pool swap if needed, then split between the token contract, a charity address, and a protocol address. Exact output swaps are blocked.

hook.name: OnePlantV4SwapHook
hook.description: OnePlant protocol hook for a NATIVE/UP token pool that collects burn fees on UP token swaps (burning UP tokens and minting OP tokens to the recipient) and team fees on native token swaps. Restricts swaps to a configurable trusted swap helper address.

hook.name: TaxStrategyHook
hook.description: A revenue-sharing hook that charges 10% fee on all swaps, automatically converting fees to ETH for strategic allocation: 90% to an automated treasury that invests in ETF-candidate tokens, 10% to development fund. Includes automated profit-taking at 10% gains with buyback-and-burn mechanism.

hook.name: FeeHook
hook.description: Charges a 1% ETH fee on every swap in ETH-denominated pools, accruing fees to a per-token registered creator address. Enforces a launch-block swap lock that only the token factory can lift; the owner can claim accrued ETH fees on behalf of creators.

hook.name: VirtualLBPStrategyBasic
hook.description: A hook implementing a Virtual Liquidity Bootstrapping Pool (LBP) strategy for token launches. It restricts pool initialization to the contract itself and gates all swaps on a migration approval flag, enabling controlled token distribution.

hook.name: Custom Fee MEV Protection Hook (Ethereum)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for TOKEN/ETH and TOKEN/WETH pools that applies configurable directional buy/sell fee overrides and optional anti-MEV protections including blacklisting, one-trade-per-block enforcement, cooldown periods, and maximum sell amount limits.

hook.name: Mechanic Hook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for a designated token/WETH pool that gates swaps behind a liquidity bootstrap phase, applies time-decaying WETH-denominated fees on buys and sells via swap delta overrides, tracks epoch market state and all-time-high price candidates, and executes automated token buybacks and burns funded by collected fees.

hook.name: TokenWorks Hook v3
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook by TokenWorks that manages fee collection and distribution for NFT strategy ETH/token pools. It enforces ETH/token-only pool initialization via the factory, applies a time-decaying buy fee (starting at 95% and decreasing to 10% over blocks), and uses afterSwapReturnsDelta to skim fees and distribute them to the protocol, stakers, and collection owners.

hook.name: AggHook
hook.description: Routes swaps through a hardcoded set of 3 Uniswap v4 pools and 6 V3-compatible pools, sorted on-the-fly by effective sqrtPrice. Handles exactIn and exactOut in both directions, returns a BeforeSwapDelta that fully settles the exchange. Liquidity additions and pool initialization are restricted to a hardcoded admin address.

hook.name: Asterix Hook
hook.description: A fee-collection hook that takes a configurable percentage of each swap's unspecified output token: for native ETH outputs the fee is forwarded to a treasury, while for ERC-20 outputs it is burned by sending to a dead address. A separate configurable portion is always forwarded to a main treasury.

hook.name: NFTStrategyHook
hook.description: A hook for NFTStrategy pools that takes swap fees with a time-decaying buy rate (starting at 99%, decreasing by 100bps per 5 blocks down to a 10% floor) and a fixed 10% sell fee. Collected fees are distributed 80% to the NFT collection, 10% to buy-and-burn PNKSTR, and 10% to a configurable fee address. Exact-output swaps are blocked, and liquidity operations are restricted to the NFTStrategyFactory.

hook.name: M0 Tick Range Hook
hook.description: Restricts liquidity provision to a configurable tick range by reverting in beforeAddLiquidity if the position's ticks fall outside the allowed bounds. An authorized manager role can update the tick range.

hook.name: TTTHook
hook.description: Uniswap v4 hook for TTT/ETH pools launched by the TenThousandTokens factory. Applies a decaying buy fee (99%→1% over 98 blocks from launch) and a flat 1% sell fee; buy fees are converted to ETH via an internal pool swap and split between a FeeSplitter and a per-token buyback sink in afterSwap.

hook.name: TuringHook
hook.description: Uniswap v4 hook for the TURING protocol that collects a 10% output fee on each swap: burns TURING tokens on buys (ETH→TURING) and distributes ETH fees on sells, splitting 1% to a team wallet and 9% to the token treasury. Calls enterSwap() on the token contract before each swap to set transient authorization.

hook.name: TokenWorks Hook v4
hook.description: A hook for the TokenWorks NFT strategy ecosystem that restricts pool initialization and liquidity addition to the NFTStrategyFactory, and collects a configurable swap fee (default 10%, with a 95% initial buy fee) distributed among the collection owner, a protocol fee address, and PNKSTR token holders.

hook.name: Hook
hook.description:
Prices swaps on an exponential bonding curve (K × (1 -
   e^(-eth/S))) instead of AMM, charging a dual-phase tax — 0.2% with 1 ETH buy 
  cap in Phase 1, 0.5% uncapped in Phase 2. Locked taxes auto-release as rewards
   to staked NFT holders when circulating supply drops below target. Uses 
  beforeSwapReturnDelta for custom delta accounting and blocks all LP additions 
  via beforeAddLiquidity.

hook.name: UPeg Hook
hook.description: Calls `start()` on a configured token when the first liquidity is added to that token's pool, and updates an internal random seed on each swap involving the configured token. Both actions are no-ops when no token is configured or for pools not involving the token.

hook.name: UpegHook
hook.description: Stores on-chain SVG data for collectible ERC-20 tokens. Calls start on the configured token when first liquidity is added, and updates a random seed on each swap involving that token.

hook.name: WethWstGbpHook
hook.description: Oracle-aware dynamic-fee hook for a WETH/wstGBP Uniswap v4 pool that sets LP fees per swap based on directional flow and deviation from a Chainlink-composed fair price (ETH/USD ÷ GBP/USD ÷ wstGBP NAV). A governance-controlled pause degrades pricing to a fixed fallback fee without blocking swaps.

hook.name: Ash Hook
hook.description: AshHook collects a configurable protocol fee (default 5%, max 10%) on ETH/ASH pool swaps: an ETH fee on buys is taken in beforeSwap via returnDelta, and an ETH fee on sells is taken in afterSwap, both forwarded to a treasury address. The owner can pause fee collection and update the fee rate and treasury.

hook.name: AshHook
hook.description: Protocol fee hook for an ASH/ETH pool that captures a configurable 5% trading fee (up to 10%) on both buys and sells, routing collected ETH to a treasury address using beforeSwapReturnsDelta for buy fees and afterSwapReturnsDelta for sell fees.

hook.name: GoalRushHook
hook.description: Uniswap V4 hook for GoalRush ($GOAL), an on-chain World Cup 2026 prediction game. On a player's first qualifying ETH→GOAL buy it mints a soulbound Predictor passport NFT (afterSwap), and on every swap it applies a tier-based dynamic LP-fee discount (beforeSwap) derived from the wallet's on-chain betting record. afterInitialize locks the canonical ETH/GOAL dynamic-fee pool. Permissions: afterInitialize, beforeSwap, afterSwap (address low 14 bits = 0x10C0).

hook.name: FairTradeHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that blocks swaps from addresses on an owner-maintained blocklist; beforeAddLiquidity and beforeRemoveLiquidity are implemented as pass-throughs with no additional logic.

hook.name: LendingHookV4
hook.description: A lending AMM hook that manages a full-range ETH/TOKEN LP position as a collateralized borrowing vault. LPs deposit ETH and TOKEN to earn swap fees; borrowers post TOKEN collateral for ETH loans at 40% LTV. Skims a 0.5% protocol fee on each swap via BeforeSwapDelta/AfterSwapDelta, and blocks swaps in any block where a liquidation occurred.

hook.name: ShitGiftHook
hook.description: An afterSwap hook that enqueues a commit-reveal lottery ticket for qualifying SHIT token buys (≥ 42069 SHIT) on the canonical pool. Tickets are settled 2+ blocks later using blockhash as RNG, giving a 1% chance of receiving 1 ether of a community-deposited art token (ERC-20/ERC-1155). Winners face a 24-hour cooldown; payouts go to tx.origin.

hook.name: ENS Wheel Hook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for the ENSWheel protocol that restricts pool initialization and liquidity additions to the ENSWheel factory, and applies a time-decaying buy fee (starting at 95%, decreasing to 10% over time) distributed between the ENS collection engine (80%) and a configurable team address (20%).

hook.name: PerpLandHook
hook.description: A leveraged-long protocol on a bonding curve that lets users open 2–5x ETH-collateralized long positions. The hook owns all pool liquidity, restricts LP operations to itself, gates trading on a `tradingEnabled` flag, enforces TWAP-based price gates on opens, caps per-block curve advances, and auto-liquidates undercollateralized positions inside `afterSwap`.

hook.name: TideHook
hook.description: TideHook is a Uniswap v4 hook that acts as both an ERC-20 token (TIDE) and the sole LP of a single v4 pool. It enforces a degressive launch fee schedule (25%→10%→5% forever) by overriding the dynamic LP fee each swap, distributes swap fees pro-rata to TIDE holders via a vesting mechanism, and features a lottery that awards forfeited unclaimed earnings from sellers to a random holder.

hook.name: Arrakis Private Hook (Ethereum)
hook.description: Restricts liquidity additions to authorized Arrakis LP modules for private vaults, and applies per-direction dynamic fee overrides on swaps via the Uniswap v4 LP fee override mechanism.

hook.name: BVCC Dynamic Fee Hook (Ethereum)
hook.description: An advanced anti-bot Uniswap v4 hook by BlockVenture Chain Capital that dynamically adjusts LP fees based on gas price levels, volatility, and 24-hour pool volume. It applies a repeat-swap penalty to deter bot activity and collects a small hook fee from each swap's output amount.

hook.name: ShitGiftHookV2
hook.description: An afterSwap hook on a configurable SHIT token pool that queues random ShitVerse art (ERC-20) token drops for qualifying buyers. Drop probability is volume-tiered (0.5%–42%), settled via future blockhash RNG with a 2-block delay and a 1-day per-address cooldown. Art tokens can be deposited permissionlessly by anyone holding valid ShitVerse factory tokens; the Ownable2Step owner can withdraw art tokens.

hook.name: NFTStrategyHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for NFT-backed token pools that charges dynamic buy fees (starting at 99% and decreasing by 100 bps per 5 blocks down to 10%) and a fixed 10% sell fee. Collected ETH fees are distributed 80% to the NFTStrategy collection, 10% to PNKSTR buyback/burn, and 10% to a configurable fee address.

hook.name: UniswapV4ScheduledMulticurveInitializerHook
hook.description: A token launch hook by Whetstone Research that gates pool initialization and liquidity additions exclusively to a designated Initializer contract, and blocks swaps until a per-pool configured start timestamp, enabling scheduled fair-launch token distributions.

hook.name: UniswapV4ScheduledMulticurveInitializerHook
hook.description: A Doppler protocol hook (by Whetstone Research) that gates pool initialization and liquidity additions to an authorized initializer contract, and enforces a configurable start time before which swaps are blocked.

hook.name: Spot
hook.description: DynamicFee Hook w/ Oracle Implementation.

hook.name: AegisHook
hook.description: Dynamic-fee hook that charges additional hook fees on every swap (collected in the input token), auto-reinvests accumulated fees into the pool via an external AegisEngine, integrates an on-chain oracle for TWAP cardinality management, and delegates limit-order processing to a LimitOrderManager.

hook.name: Aegis DFM
hook.description: A dynamic fee market maker hook that uses a truncated geometric oracle to compute base and surge fees, collects a protocol fee share on each swap, and reinvests collected fees into a full-range liquidity position.

hook.name: VolumeDynamicFeeHook
hook.description: Dynamically adjusts LP fees based on swap volume using an exponential moving average, cycling between floor, cash, and extreme fee tiers. Also charges a configurable hook fee collected as an afterSwap delta.

hook.name: WETH Hook (Optimism)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that enables seamless wrapping and unwrapping of ETH to WETH within a pool, intercepting swaps to perform 1:1 ETH↔WETH conversions while blocking direct liquidity operations.

hook.name: IndexHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for index token pools that enforces an owner-controlled pool allowlist, applies dynamic LP fees with optional custom hook fees, grants zero-fee swaps to index tokens swapping on their own native pools, and tracks index token balances across pools for burn coefficient accounting.

hook.name: VolumeDynamicFeeHook
hook.description: A single-pool Uniswap v4 hook that dynamically adjusts LP fees across three regimes (floor, cash, extreme) based on EMA-smoothed per-period volume analysis. After each swap, it accrues a configurable percentage of LP fees to the hook owner and may update the pool's dynamic fee tier via poolManager.updateDynamicLPFee().

hook.name: SuperDCAGauge
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for SuperDCA token pools implementing a three-tier dynamic fee structure (0% internal, 0.10% keeper, 0.50% external), a king-of-the-hill keeper deposit mechanism, and SuperDCA token reward distribution via minting and pool donations triggered on liquidity operations. Only verified router addresses are permitted to execute swaps.

hook.name: BackGeoOracle
hook.description: A TWAP oracle hook that automatically executes backrun swaps to restore price toward its geometric mean after significant price moves, crediting backrun proceeds to the original swapper via ERC6909 tokens. Only supports exactIn swaps on zero-fee, full-range oracle pools.

hook.name: BackGeoOracle
hook.description: Oracle hook for zero-fee, full-range Uniswap v4 pools that records TWAP observations and performs automatic backrun swaps to partially reverse large price impacts, returning value to swappers via ERC6909 tokens. Only exactIn swaps are supported; routers must implement IMsgSender or backrun transactions will revert.

hook.name: EMADynamicFeeHook
hook.description: EMA-based dynamic fee hook for Uniswap V4. Calculates swap fees using Exponential Moving Average of price, with 30-step fee schedule (0.01%-3.00%) and 300-block anti-JIT protection via tx.origin. No owner, no admin functions, fully immutable

hook.name: Findex Hook (Optimism)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for the Findex protocol that restricts pool initialization and liquidity additions to whitelisted pools and authorized providers, while managing dynamic LP fees and granting transfer exceptions to limited-account holders after swaps and liquidity events.

hook.name: Spot
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that implements dynamic fee management backed by a truncated geometric oracle, charging protocol fees on swaps (exactIn and exactOut) and auto-reinvesting them as full-range liquidity.

hook.name: VolumeDynamicFeeHook
hook.description: Adjusts the pool's dynamic LP fee across up to 7 tiers based on an EMA of stablecoin-denominated swap volume, raising fees during high-volume periods and lowering them during lulls. A guardian address can pause the hook, which locks the fee at a configured pause tier until unpaused.

hook.name: ATXMV4GlobalHook
hook.description: A liquidity management hook that restricts add/remove liquidity to owner-whitelisted pools and enforces full-range positions. Emits PositionLiquidityChanged events with LP attribution resolved via optional 20-byte hookData or Polygon PositionManager NFT ownership.

hook.name: Aegis V1.1
hook.description: Dynamic fee hook designed to optimize capital efficiency, protect LP value, and automatically adapt to market volatility.

hook.name: Spot
hook.description: Uniswap v4 hook that applies volatility-based dynamic fee overrides on each swap, collects a configurable protocol fee share, and reinvests it into a full-range liquidity position via a connected FullRangeLiquidityManager. It also maintains a truncated geometric oracle to track per-block tick movement for automated fee tuning.

hook.name: BackGeoOracle
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that maintains an on-chain TWAP oracle and executes automatic backrun logic to mitigate price impact — when a swap moves the price beyond a threshold, the hook performs a partial or full inverse swap in the same transaction and credits the original trader with the proceeds as ERC6909 tokens.

hook.name: AggHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that aggregates USDC.e/USDC swaps across 12 liquidity pools (11 v4 pools and 1 PancakeSwap v3 pool) by sorting routes by effective sqrtPrice and filling sequentially. It uses beforeSwapReturnsDelta to return the aggregated delta, levies a fee via poolManager.donate(), and restricts pool initialization and liquidity addition to a hardcoded admin address.

hook.name: LimitOrderHook
hook.description: Records the pool tick before each swap using transient storage, then invokes an external LimitOrderManager to execute limit orders that crossed the tick range after each swap. Includes role-gated dynamic LP fee management via poolManager.updateDynamicLPFee().

hook.name: IndexHook
hook.description: A hook for index token pools that tracks index token reserves across liquidity positions, applies a 0% LP fee override for the index token's own self-swaps, and optionally takes a custom hook fee from swap input. Pool operations are restricted to explicitly allowlisted pools, and liquidity additions enforce a per-pool LP allowlist for manually added pools.

hook.name: EMADynamicFeeHook
hook.description: EMA-based dynamic fee hook for Uniswap V4. Calculates swap fees using Exponential Moving Average of price, with 30-step fee schedule (0.01%-3.00%) and 300-block anti-JIT protection via tx.origin. No owner, no admin functions, fully immutable.

hook.name: Spot
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that implements dynamic LP fee management using a base+surge model from a DynamicFeeManager, records price observations via a truncated geometric oracle, and collects a protocol fee share on both exact-in and exact-out swaps, reinvesting proceeds via a FullRangeLiquidityManager.

hook.name: LimitOrderHook
hook.description: Executes limit orders by tracking tick movement across swaps: beforeSwap stores the current tick in transient storage, and afterSwap calls an external LimitOrderManager to fill any orders whose tick range was crossed. Includes a role-gated function for updating the pool's dynamic LP fee via poolManager.updateDynamicLPFee().

hook.name: TELxIncentiveHook
hook.description: Tracks LP positions in an external PositionRegistry to support off-chain incentive reward calculation; gates pool initialization and liquidity operations to an authorized position manager.

hook.name: PensionTaxHook
hook.description: Collects a fixed 4% tax (400 bips) on ETH involved in swaps: deducted from ETH-input swaps via beforeSwapReturnsDelta and from ETH-output swaps via afterSwapReturnsDelta, forwarding the collected ETH directly to an immutable pension fund vault address.

hook.name: Clanker Dynamic Fee Hook (V2)
hook.description: A dynamic fee hook for Clanker pools that adjusts LP fees based on realized volatility. It simulates each swap to estimate the post-swap tick, computes a volatility accumulator from tick displacement relative to a reference tick, and calls updateDynamicLPFee with a fee that scales quadratically with volatility, bounded by configurable base and max fee parameters.

hook.name: Spot
hook.description: A dynamic-fee Uniswap v4 hook that adjusts LP fees based on market volatility using a truncated geometric oracle, and charges a configurable protocol fee (POL share) reinvested as full-range liquidity. Supports both exactIn and exactOut swaps with fee accounting handled via BeforeSwapDelta and AfterSwapDelta.

hook.name: Renzo Hook (Unichain)
hook.description: A peg stability hook for the ETH/ezETH pool that charges a minimum fee for trades moving toward the peg and a linearly-scaled fee based on deviation from the ezETH rate provider price for trades moving away from the peg.

hook.name: Limit Order Hook (Unichain)
hook.description: Enables limit order functionality on Uniswap v4 pools by storing the pre-swap tick in transient storage and executing limit orders after each swap based on tick crossings. Also supports dynamic LP fee updates through a role-based access control system.

hook.name: Aegis v1 Hook (Unichain)
hook.description: A dynamic fee hook that uses a truncated geometric oracle to compute adaptive swap fees based on market volatility. Protocol fees are collected from swaps (both exact-in and exact-out) and automatically reinvested into full-range liquidity positions via an integrated liquidity manager.

hook.name: BackGeoOracle
hook.description: Oracle hook with automated backrun functionality that mitigates price impact. Enforces zero-fee, max-tick-spacing, full-range-only pools. On swaps (exactIn only), computes a tick delta versus the last observation; if the price impact exceeds a threshold, executes an inverse nested swap and mints ERC6909 tokens to the original sender. Requires swap routers to implement `IMsgSender.msgSender()` or backrun-triggering transactions will revert.

hook.name: BackGeoOracle
hook.description: A TWAP oracle hook that records tick observations on every pool action and executes automatic backrun swaps after price-impactful trades, returning value to the original swapper as ERC6909 tokens.

hook.name: EMADynamicFeeHook
hook.description: EMA-based dynamic fee hook for Uniswap V4. Calculates swap fees using Exponential Moving Average of price, with 30-step fee schedule (0.01%-3.00%) and 300-block anti-JIT protection via tx.origin. No owner, no admin functions, fully immutable.

hook.name: WETH Hook (Unichain)
hook.description: A 1:1 ETH/WETH wrapper hook that intercepts swaps in beforeSwap to wrap ETH into WETH or unwrap WETH into ETH, bypassing the pool's AMM math via BeforeSwapDelta. Liquidity additions are blocked — the hook itself manages liquidity.

hook.name: Panoptic Oracle Hook (Unichain)
hook.description: Records price observations on each swap and initializes oracle state on pool initialization, exposing a Uniswap V3-compatible oracle interface with both standard and truncated tick adapters deployed per pool.

hook.name: Aegis v3 Hook (Unichain)
hook.description: A dynamic AMM hook that adjusts LP fees based on market volatility using a truncated geometric oracle with surge fee mechanism, enforces tick movement caps to limit price manipulation, and automatically reinvests protocol fees into full-range liquidity positions.

hook.name: AsyncSwap
hook.description: Async order book that intercepts exact-input swaps — the maker's input is taken as a 6909 claim and an open order is created at a limit price. A filler later settles by delivering the minimum output amount directly to the maker, bypassing the AMM entirely.

hook.name: Clanker Dynamic Fee Hook (Unichain)
hook.description: A Clanker-integrated hook that dynamically adjusts LP fees based on price volatility (tick-difference accumulation with decay), charging a base fee plus a variable component scaled by recent price movement. It also extracts a 20% protocol fee on non-clanker token sides of swaps, and temporarily protects newly launched pools via a configurable MEV module for the first 2 minutes post-creation.

hook.name: Aegis v2 Hook (Unichain)
hook.description: Spot is a Uniswap v4 hook that implements dynamic fee management using a truncated geometric oracle and a DynamicFeeManager to compute base and surge fees based on recent trading activity. It also collects protocol fees and reinvests them into a full-range liquidity position via a FullRangeLiquidityManager.

hook.name: Spot
hook.description: A dynamic fee AMM hook that computes LP fees via a DynamicFeeManager and a truncated geometric oracle, takes a configurable protocol share (POL share) of each swap fee, and auto-reinvests collected fees into a full-range liquidity position via FullRangeLiquidityManager.

hook.name: MEVTaxTestInProd
hook.description: Implements a priority-fee-proportional MEV tax as a dynamic LP fee. On each swap, the fee is scaled proportionally to the transaction's priority fee relative to the highest priority fee observed in the previous block, with owner-configurable minimum and maximum bounds.

hook.name: Clanker Static Fee Hook (Unichain)
hook.description: Applies configurable, direction-dependent static fees to swaps involving Clanker-deployed tokens, collecting protocol fees from the paired token side. Includes an optional MEV-protection module that is active for the first two minutes after pool deployment.

hook.name: Uniderp Hook (Unichain)
hook.description: A fee-collection and referral hook for Uniderp token launches on Unichain that takes a 1% fee on swaps and distributes it among token creators, multi-level referrers (up to 3 tiers), and the platform via afterSwapReturnsDelta. It also records referral relationships during swaps and liquidity additions when a referrer address is provided in hookData.

hook.name: Universal Hook (Unichain)
hook.description: A JIT (Just-In-Time) liquidity hook that intercepts swaps via beforeSwap and fulfills them internally at oracle-reported prices through a MerchantController-managed liquidity system. Standard liquidity additions and removals are blocked; only owner-initialized, oracle-whitelisted pools with an approved pair token are supported.

hook.name: Spot
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that implements dynamic LP fee management and protocol fee collection. In beforeSwap, it computes a dynamic fee (base + surge via DynamicFeeManager, or a manual override) and charges a protocol share on exactIn swaps; in afterSwap, it does the same for exactOut swaps. Collected fees are minted as ERC-6909 credits to a FullRangeLiquidityManager for optional auto-reinvestment, while a TruncatedGeometricOracle tracks tick movement for volatility-based fee tuning.

hook.name: WC2026Hook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that collects configurable campaign fees on swaps in a designated OKB pool during an active time window, routing collected fees to a goal prize pool distributed via randomness-based shot mechanics with country-based attribution.

hook.name: KickIt Possession Fee Hook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that implements a possession-based dynamic fee for a $KICK/WOKB pool. In `beforeSwap`, it computes and overrides the LP fee (0.30%–1.50%) based on a time-decaying buy/sell pressure score; in `afterSwap`, it updates that score with the completed trade's direction and size, scaled by a configurable tournament phase.

hook.name: Spot
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook (contract Spot) that implements dynamic LP fee management, protocol fee collection, and oracle price observations. In beforeSwap it computes fee overrides via lpFeeOverride and charges protocol fees; in afterSwap it updates tick oracles, settles fees, and triggers liquidity reinvestment.

hook.name: Spot
hook.description: A dynamic fee management hook that computes swap fees from a policy manager and dynamic fee manager, collects protocol fees as hook deltas on both exactIn and exactOut swaps, and optionally reinvests collected fees into a full-range liquidity position. Uses transient storage and a truncated geometric oracle to record pre-swap ticks for fee volatility adjustments.

hook.name: Spot
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook implementing dynamic LP fees computed from volatility and surge conditions, a truncated geometric price oracle, and protocol fee collection with reinvestment into full-range liquidity positions. Fees are charged on both exact-input and exact-output swaps.
